faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: How can I get into Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
BPT Candidate must be passed in 10+2 or equivalent from a recognised Board/University Candidate must have Minimum 50% marks in English Language in 10+2 or equivalent from a recognised Board/University
MPT Candidate Must have passed Bachelor of Physiotherapy examination from full time, in-campus BPT course programme from an institution/university duly recognised by the Indian Association of Physiotherapists. Candidates who are presently doing their BPT internship is also eligible to apply, but their admission to the course is subject to their internship completion on or before August 14, 2022.

faqs.question: What are the facilities available for students at Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: Institute has a well supported campus with facilities such as Auditorium, Boys Hostel, Cafeteria, Co-ed Hostel, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus.

faqs.question: What is the median package of MPT course available at Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: As per information available, Institute offers (aprx) INR 334,285 median salary to their students for MPT course during placements.

placements.overview:
Founded in 2001, Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy is a partnership institute. It is located in Gangtok, Sikkim. Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 2 courses across different specialisations. Some of the courses offered at this institute include BPT and MPT. Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy fees ranges between INR 4,40,000 to 6,00,000. The student intake for these courses is 55. Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy offers these course across fields such as Medicine & Health Sciences. The median salary offered to students is INR 4,20,000. Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy offers all the campus facilities to students.

Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as BPT. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MPT. Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy courses stands around INR 4,40,000 to 6,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Median salary of BPT course is INR 370,000 as per the reports/data available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It comes under India's top 3 physiotherapy colleges.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students got placements. The wage depended on how well you excelled in the course, and it was pretty good. Government hospitals and the Indian Athletics team were among the options. I didn't know much, but the placements were very good. Good offers were placed in front of us and the best faculty.
review_content.Infrastructure: Describing the infrastructure was reasonable since it was a professional course. The library and classrooms were pretty nice and were equipped with everything. Our college offered every opportunity in sports and extracurricular activities. It was the best college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Tour of Sikkim Manipal Institute.

review_content.Placements: There are 58 students in our classroom. The maximum package for our course is 18 LPA. The top roles offered in our course include Neurophysiotherapist, Sports Physiotherapist, and Physiotherapist for the Pediatric Department. Additionally, being associated with Manipal makes it easier for students from this college to secure jobs in higher organizations.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very good. It is situated in the lap of mother nature, allowing students to enjoy a natural and peaceful environment throughout their studies. All classrooms are well-equipped, and the library has a wide range of books. However, the quality of food in the mess is not very good, though over time, students get habituated to it.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Sikkim Manipal University of Medical Science

review_content.Placements: Those students who get a good percentage in their final year university exams get placed here in the same college and in the hospital of this college. The average package for last year was 4 lakhs per annum, with the highest being 29 lakhs. Top roles offered include lecturer, sports physiotherapist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is well equipped with a wide range of books for every department, and classrooms also have smart boards. The infrastructure of this college is pretty good, not very good; here they don't have a large campus. The quality of food in the mess is okay, and in the canteen, you can find good food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 75% of students were placed in very good hospitals and with a very good package. The highest package that our seniors got is 6 LPA. Everyone gets an internship from our course in Manipal Hospital itself and different, different hospitals and the top role offered in our course is a physiotherapist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very large, labs got real cadavers and everything that's needed and the campus is also big; wifi is available, and classrooms are clean, tidy and big. We got a very big library, and we even got digital libraries when students can stay back and study

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It has really good infrastructure and is a very satisfying college.

review_content.Placements: Our course consists of 4 and a half years, where the first 4 years are for theory—2 years for fully theory and 2 years for theory as well as clinical postings. The other half of the year is for internships. In our 2024 batch, we have 55 students in total from different states.
review_content.Infrastructure: Since I don’t stay in the hostel, I don’t know much about hostel life, but many of my friends who stay there share about it. The courses are pretty good, and we get every opportunity we want, which is really beneficial for us.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy.

review_content.Placements: Last year, students were placed in the nearby hospitals with good package. As per the placement report, the maximum package was 29 lakhs and the average was 7 lakhs per year. Apollo visits our college. Top roles offered in our course are sports physiotherapist, orthopedics, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Here the infrastructure is really good and this college is situated in the lap of mother nature. The campus is really beautiful, as are the environment. Classrooms are well equipped as per the needs of our course, and the library has a wide range of books. WiFi is available here. Medical facilities are also provided when needed, and a discount is also given for students.

highlights.description: Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #4 by the Outlook-ICARE 2025 under the Physiotherapy category. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy rankings have been explained in the article below:

outlook.description:
Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Physiotherapy' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Physiotherapy' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy's rank is #4, the same as last year's rank in the 'Physiotherapy' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy.
reviews.review_text: Here the infrastructure is really good and this college is situated in the lap of mother nature. The campus is really beautiful, as are the environment. Classrooms are well equipped as per the needs of our course, and the library has a wide range of books. WiFi is available here. Medical facilities are also provided when needed, and a discount is also given for students.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, with a well-maintained library containing almost all the books. I don't stay at the hostel, but my friends say that the hostel rooms are good and the mess food is moderate. It won't give you a home feel, but it's overall good.

reviews.review_heading: SMCPT, in short, is a great college.
reviews.review_text: If you want the best infrastructure, with all the specimens required and amazing classrooms, SMU is the best. I love how they provide specimens for BPT students, which is commonly not available in other colleges, as it is an institute of medical sciences. The availability of everything is 100%, and there are lots of sports events for BPT students too.

reviews.review_heading: Sikkim Manipal University of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library with a good number of books, so you don't have to buy everything; you can borrow from the library. There are all necessary labs for physiotherapy, and the classrooms are well-equipped. There is 24/7 Wi-Fi connection in the library and in the hostel too. However, the hostel doesn't provide good facilities; for a 3-seater room, it's not very spacious, and the food is not great.

college_info.intro:
As one of the premier Business institutes in southern India, SRM School of Management offers a wide variety of courses available in different specializations. These are the flagship courses like Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) and Master of Business Administration (MBA). The BBA and MBA courses lay a solid educational foundation for students aspiring for a career in Management. These programs can be learned in different streams like Business Analytics, Hospital Management, Data Science, etc.
Students can check out the below given information for more on SRM School of Management popular programs:

faqs.answer: A:    The alumni data for the SRM School of Management is unavailable. According to unofficial online sources, a large share of SRM IST alumni is placed in the Engineering sector, followed by the Education and Operations sectors. The other top sectors that involve the majority of alumni are Information Technology and Business Development. Besides this, the alumni are spread across varied sectors such as Research, Media and Communication, Administrative, Arts and Design, Marketing, Human Resource

review_content.Placements: About 80 percent of students have placed in my course. Moreover, in the last batch, the highest package received was 5 LPA. course_faqs.question: How long is the MBA programme at SRM School of Management?
course_faqs.answer: Studying at SRM SoM, the MBA programme is meant for two years and is delivered on a full-time basis. There are four semesters and the second year covers electives. review_summary.college_name: SRM School of Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Lovely days at my college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very vague, as a lot of students opt out of placements because of their CGPA, and they are not considered for placement. If you are an average student, you can get around 6 to 7 LPA if you maintain your CGPA. Companies like Wipro and L&T are the top recruiters. For internships, you have to secure them yourself, as the college gives almost zero support.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE, as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. The library is also pretty good, with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive, and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o’clock, so beware of that.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college to study in, and we can choose it without any confusion.

content.Placements: The placement rate is about 70% or above. Students are placed mainly in fields such as digital marketing and IT. Eligibility for placements is generally 75% or above with no arrears.
content.Infrastructure: The college has very good infrastructure. It includes classrooms, labs, and a library. Hostel is very clean. Food provided is good for consumption. The college is very supportive of sports. They gives extra care to sports activities..
content.Faculty: Teachers are very good at teaching and help students score good marks. The pass percentage requirement is above 35%. As a student at SRM, teachers help prepare students for the industry, as they are highly qualified and knowledgeable. Teachers also train students for campus placements and examinations. Teachers teach every topic clearly, which helps students score well in semester examinations. They also regularly train students for internships.

Many recruiters, such as TCS, Accenture, and others, come for placements. About 70% of students got placed well on campus. A manager-level course is offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good with many facilities: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Everything is organized in a well-structured manner. There are extracurricular activities, and medical emergency facilities are also available. The campus has a sports arena as well.

individual_reviews.title: This college is the best place for pursuing the engineering course.

content.Placements: The SRM Institute of Science and Technology offers the placement to the students who fit in there placement criteria and even after fitting that criteria many students refuse the placement to pursue the higher studies and don't go to the placements.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college life in a nutshell :).

content.Placements: Since we are the first batch, I do not know much about it, but the average package starts at 5–6 LPA for a BBA general. If you perform pretty well academically and have the skills needed, you can earn more. Around 90% of students always get placed.
content.Infrastructure: There's Wi-Fi always, the labs are well-equipped too, and the and the classrooms are okayish. I live in a PG, but according to my friend, the food in the hostel is the best, they have a wide range of varieties every day, and there's a huge scope for sports since they conduct many events.

admission_process.title: SRM School of Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: To get admission to SRM School of Management students have to follow various steps, like  filling out the application form, qualifying for the selection rounds and final seat confirmation. Refer to the pointers below to know the SRM School of Management admission 2025 process-
1- SRM School of Management Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission to the MBA are required to fill out the TANCET application form for admission. Additionally, after filling out all the criteria set by the college, candidates are required to visit the official website of the college to fill out the registration form.
2- SRM School of Management Selection Round

SRM School of Management admission is based on the entrance exam for the MBA programme, whereas BBA admission is merit-based. The college selects candidates for MBA based on TNCET exam scores. Additionally, college also accepts CET/MAT/CAT, and other entrance tests. To clear the selection round and get to the counselling round for final seat allotment, students have first clear the GD and the personal interview round.
3- Final seat Confirmation
After candidates get selected, they must complete their enrollment by submitting the requiredSRM School of Management feewithin the given deadline to secure admission.

eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, NMAT, XAT, SRMJEEM, TANCET, CMAT, CAT
courses_data.description: Students can pursue a two-year postgraduate MBA programme at SRM School of Management and take specializations in HR, Finance and Marketing.After passing the entrance exams CAT, MAT, TANCET, etc., successful students proceed to counselling.Academic learning is balanced with industry involvement in the program.

faqs.question: How long is the MBA programme at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: Studying at SRM SoM, the MBA programme is meant for two years and is delivered on a full-time basis.There are four semesters and the second year covers electives.Internships, live projects and capstone work are part of what students do.Developing leadership and managerial skills is the main purpose of the course.

faqs.question: What if I can't get into SRM School of Management for MBA?
faqs.answer: If admission to SRM School of Management for MBA is not possible, you may try to apply next year or check other institutions that accept similar tests.Because SRMIST has several campuses, you can see if there are any MBA seats available at the other campuses.You could try to improve your entrance exam result and apply again with a better profile.Looking into related PG Diploma or certificate courses is a good alternative.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted for MBA admission at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: CAT, MAT, TANCET, XAT, NMAT and GMAT are accepted as entrance tests for admission to the MBA programme at SRM School of Management.People applying must obtain a high enough score in at least one of these exams.If you are offered admission, the next part is counselling and, possibly, an interview.It is also very important to graduate at or above the 50% mark.

faqs.question: What are the specializations offered under MBA at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: Students at SRM School of Management can focus on Marketing, Finance, Human Resource Management, Operations and Systems as specializations.Students are free to select subjects that match what they want to achieve and what skill they are already good at.You begin your specialisation in the second year of the programme.They support the development of specific skills and finding new jobs.

courses_data.name: SRM School of Management BBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: BBA programme at SRM School of Management is a three-year undergraduate course meant to offer basic training in business and management.Students must pass Class 12 to get admitted on merit.It offers students the opportunity to learn for future managing roles or apply for MBA studies.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BBA at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: You need to have pass Class 12 from a recognised board to apply for BBA at SRM School of Management.Any stream of study is acceptable for eligibility.Admission depends only on students' performance in the qualifying exam.No exam is needed to apply for this programme.

faqs.question: What is the duration and structure of the BBA course at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: The Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) at SRM School of Management is a full-time programme that takes three years.It has six semesters and includes marketing, finance, HR and entrepreneurship subjects.Projects, case studies and engagement with industry are part of the course.It inspires students to take part in internships.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance exam for admission to BBA at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: No, entrance exams are not needed or used at SRM School of Management for admission to the BBA program.Admission is only given according to the candidate's performance in Class 12.It is necessary to use the official SRMIST admission portal.Those chosen to be shortlisted will be told to bring their documents for verification.

hostel_campus.college_name: SRM School of Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
SRM  has14 blocks for boys and 7 blocks for girls as hostel. All the hostels have hi speed Wi-Fi connectivity and are provided with solar water have heating systems, mineral water supply, water cooler in each floor, generator power supply and offers multi cuisine dining facility including thai, chinese and continental food. Rooms with single cot ,study table & chair, cupboard & common mirror are available. Most hostels have common washrooms, a few blocks are available with attached bath and AC rooms too. Facilities such as gym, prayer halls, games, sports and cultural activities has been facilitated. All rooms are available in triple sharing basis.3 International hostels with modernized kitchen,library,drinking water, water heater, telephone,power supply, medical care, recreation,stationery shop, laundry point, gym, playground, indoor games, banking facility, a/c dining hall, a/c study hall.International hostel is also available.
For more information kindly visit institute's website.

library.description:
The library comprises a rich collection of books covering various branches of Management, Engineering and Technology, Medical and Health Sciences and Science and Humanities. The library has stocked 140518 volumes of books consisting of 61289 titles. The collection also includes 1550 handbooks & 200 encyclopedias. Back volume is about 4105. 8235 above project thesis. 781 standards which include BIS, ISA & IEEE. Around 5938 books CDs, 2710 journal CDs, 25 encyclopedia on CDs, 20 self learning tutorials, 850 video programs are available in the library.Cumulative database of nearly 2.52 lakh records covering the period from 1990 - 1999 are available. The library building is fully air-conditioned and automated. Photocopy facility is available in the library.
For more information kindly visit institute's website.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Hockey Ground

reviews.review_heading: Lovely days at my college.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE, as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. The library is also pretty good, with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive, and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o’clock, so beware of that.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to study in, and we can choose it without any confusion.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure. It includes classrooms, labs, and a library. Hostel is very clean. Food provided is good for consumption. The college is very supportive of sports. They gives extra care to sports activities..

reviews.review_heading: A pleasant experience at SRM, an overall wonderful journey.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good with many facilities: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Everything is organized in a well-structured manner. There are extracurricular activities, and medical emergency facilities are also available. The campus has a sports arena as well.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best place for pursuing the engineering course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the SRM Institute of Science and Technology is very good; almost all the classrooms on the campus are air conditioned and the facility of a library is available here, although the food in the canteen is not as good as expected .

reviews.review_heading: My college life in a nutshell :).
reviews.review_text: There's Wi-Fi always, the labs are well-equipped too, and the and the classrooms are okayish. I live in a PG, but according to my friend, the food in the hostel is the best, they have a wide range of varieties every day, and there's a huge scope for sports since they conduct many events.

reviews.review_heading: The most blissful college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the class is awesome and worth the fee you are paying. There are air conditioned classrooms having smart boards. Wi-Fi facilities are available for the students both in the college campus and the hostel. The food in the hostel is good and too many items are included in the menu. There are gym facilities in every hostel with many stores are available at every nook and corner so the student don't face any inconvenience. Free medical check up is available for SRMIST students. ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college because of qualified faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure is really good and the quality of the facilities is also really nice in the college. There is a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility available. Fintech Lab is fully equipped with resources for financial services students. University Building’s library is a really great place to study and read newspapers.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and infrastructure with well reputed faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a good infrastructure. The classrooms are smart with free Wi-Fi and  air conditioners. They provide us with computer labs and fintech labs which are always open for the students. We also have a library which is open for the students for their research and studying.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is good accommodation and good quality food available in the hostel and the mess of the college. We have smart classrooms with free Wi-Fi and air conditioning. We have access to fintech labs. There is a library which is open for the students to do their researches.

reviews.review_heading: Best Campus Life in Chennai.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and AC classrooms are provided here. Our department has a separate library, and medical facilities are available on the campus. Hostel facilities are great, and there is a diversity of food options available due to people coming from various cultural backgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college life.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good, and the college building is nicely built. The design is simple but attractive, and the college is strict in that no helmet entry is prohibited. Wi-Fi is available, but the speed is low, and sometimes connection issues arise. I do not recommend hostel food because the quality is poor. In college restaurants, good food is served. Once a year, they remember that we need to focus on sports; otherwise, no sports activities are conducted by the college.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college and our courses include free Wi-Fi, well-equipped laboratories, clean water and well-maintained restrooms. The hostel provides high-speed Wi-Fi available at my college and air-conditioned bus services for students.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for management.
reviews.review_text: SRM College of Management has good infrastructure, hostels are well managed and mess food is good and edible. Wi-Fi connections are good in classrooms and labs but not in the entire college. The canteen offers various food items that are good and at an affordable price.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRM School of Management, SRMIST - SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. The library is equipped with air-conditioners. It has many books. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. Wi-Fi facility is available in our college and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. The central library is available in our college. The library is spacious and good. Our HOD is very responsible. Our college has a sports quota. Our college has a medical college and hospital.

college_info.college_name: Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research:

faqs.answer: A:    Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research has received an impressive review rating of 4.5 on Placements based on 2 feedback of verified Shiksha students.
faqs.question: Does Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely MBBS. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research offers MD, MS and PG Diploma. The fees for Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research courses range between INR 3,08,000 to 47,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research is a well-known institution for PG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research has course specializations in Obstetrics & Gynecology, Public Health, Radiology, Pediatrics, Anaesthesia, Anatomy, Biochemistry, Community Medicine, Dermatology, General Medicine, General Surgery, Microbiology, Ophthalmology, Orthopaedics, ENT, Pathology, Pharmacology, Physiology, Psychiatry.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research?

review_content.Placements: Since we are studying in MBBS, there is no direct placement, but many of us get selected for PG courses in well-known institutes and the UPSC CMS exam. We do have internships at our college hospital in different departments, with an emergency post for a year with a good stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a central library that is very spacious, fully air-conditioned and well-maintained. There is the availability of all the subject books, along with their references and journals related to the latest innovations in the field. The laboratories are well-equipped with the latest instruments. There are four blocks for each particular year, with separate lecture theatres, demonstration rooms, and small subject libraries for each, along with a museum.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is an amazing medical college with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: We were studying in a medical college. So, we have a pass-out percentage of batch strength, it was about 75-80%. Although every student who clears M. B. B. S. got a job in the government or private sector as a medical officer. Every medical officer would get a minimum of 7.2 LPA in government set up as a contractual. No companies were there for medical officer placements. After completing 4.5 years of M. B. B. S. education there was a 1-year compulsory rotating internship in various departments. We would get a maximum of resident medical officers (Cl-1) after many years of medical officership.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Public Health - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is an excellent place to gain practical knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides very good placements every year. Our college also provided internships in our college with a stipend of Rs. 13,000 to students. In this internship, students learn many lessons which are important for their future.
review_content.Infrastructure: Around 50% waiver is offered to the students of this college by the state government. It can be available to everybody. However, girls are offered free education by the state government at no cost. Hostel facilities are also good.

review_summary.college_name: Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Well satisfied study infrastructure and faculty members, better practical knowledge .

content.Placements: Since we are studying in MBBS, there is no direct placement, but many of us get selected for PG courses in well-known institutes and the UPSC CMS exam. We do have internships at our college hospital in different departments, with an emergency post for a year with a good stipend.
content.Infrastructure: There is a central library that is very spacious, fully air-conditioned and well-maintained. There is the availability of all the subject books, along with their references and journals related to the latest innovations in the field. The laboratories are well-equipped with the latest instruments. There are four blocks for each particular year, with separate lecture theatres, demonstration rooms, and small subject libraries for each, along with a museum.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is an amazing medical college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: We were studying in a medical college. So, we have a pass-out percentage of batch strength, it was about 75-80%. Although every student who clears M. B. B. S. got a job in the government or private sector as a medical officer. Every medical officer would get a minimum of 7.2 LPA in government set up as a contractual. No companies were there for medical officer placements. After completing 4.5 years of M. B. B. S. education there was a 1-year compulsory rotating internship in various departments. We would get a maximum of resident medical officers (Cl-1) after many years of medical officership.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Public Health - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college is an excellent place to gain practical knowledge.

content.Placements: Our college provides very good placements every year. Our college also provided internships in our college with a stipend of Rs. 13,000 to students. In this internship, students learn many lessons which are important for their future.
content.Infrastructure: Around 50% waiver is offered to the students of this college by the state government. It can be available to everybody. However, girls are offered free education by the state government at no cost. Hostel facilities are also good.

review_content.Placements: Our medical college doesn't provide placements, but our college does have an internship course of one year, where students get to learn and perform new surgeries. Our college also offers post-graduation in all nine departments of dentistry, like oral pathology, oral medicine and radiology, prosthodontics, periodontics, pedodontics, conservative and endodontics, public health dentistry, orthodontics, and oral and maxillofacial surgery.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college classrooms are well-facilitated with air conditioners and projectors for a better teaching and learning experience. Labs and clinics are present for all the respective departments. We also have a central library, which has more than 1 lakh books. The college hostel is decent, with four girls' hostels and one boys' hostel. Mess food is good, and we also have a canteen, supermarket, and stationery shop within the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I really like my college and I miss it now after being placed into a postgraduate course .

review_content.Placements: 100 percent students get placed in the course and the college offers excellent opportunities to learn and explore the clinical and academic side for each and every student. There is a window of opportunity for each and every student, and preclinical and clinicals are taught well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel and college infrastructure is good and the campus environment is good enough to study as well as spend good time, and it is also very near to the city. The hostel is very near the bus stops, train station and to the main road.

overview_faqs.question: Is MNR Dental College and Hospital worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: MNR Dental College and Hospital is a distinguished institution offering MDS, BDS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. MNR Dental College and Hospital is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. MNR Dental College and Hospital has received an impressive review rating of 4.5 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 4 for Campus Life, 4.5 for Placements, 5 for Faculty, and 4.5 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: MNR Dental College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall a good college, you can go for it.

content.Placements: Our medical college doesn't provide placements, but our college does have an internship course of one year, where students get to learn and perform new surgeries. Our college also offers post-graduation in all nine departments of dentistry, like oral pathology, oral medicine and radiology, prosthodontics, periodontics, pedodontics, conservative and endodontics, public health dentistry, orthodontics, and oral and maxillofacial surgery.
content.Infrastructure: Our college classrooms are well-facilitated with air conditioners and projectors for a better teaching and learning experience. Labs and clinics are present for all the respective departments. We also have a central library, which has more than 1 lakh books. The college hostel is decent, with four girls' hostels and one boys' hostel. Mess food is good, and we also have a canteen, supermarket, and stationery shop within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I really like my college and I miss it now after being placed into a postgraduate course .

content.Placements: 100 percent students get placed in the course and the college offers excellent opportunities to learn and explore the clinical and academic side for each and every student. There is a window of opportunity for each and every student, and preclinical and clinicals are taught well.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel and college infrastructure is good and the campus environment is good enough to study as well as spend good time, and it is also very near to the city. The hostel is very near the bus stops, train station and to the main road.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Best place to make an identity of particular person.

content.Placements: '80%of students were placed in our course. The highest 1.5lakhs for faculty. Prosthodontics top role in our course. *75%of students were in internship labs. * Clean, tidy hospitals. *Very much of patiency by the doctors towards patients. * Good college environment.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, library, Wi-Fi are provided in our college Hostel neat and cleanly ness. Making surroundings very tidy. Good food. Everything available in canteen which we like to eat. We have ground to play ie;we play basketball, throwball badminton.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Subhas Bose Institute of Hotel Management [SBIHM] Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

review_content.General: In my college classrooms were small and there was no proper Wi-Fi connection. We did not have a dedicated library, and only a few computers were available which was not sufficient for students. Hostel facilities were very basic with small rooms and the mess food was repetitive and often not of good quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor in Travel and Tourism Management - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: SBIHM Jatragachi campus is a very good college for me. I think it will also be good for you.

review_content.Placements: Subhas Bose Institute of Hotel Management is one of the best management colleges in Kolkata. In the previous year, about 69% of students from our college got placed. Our course in tourism management offers a salary of Rs. 18,000 per month to Rs. 25,000 per month. This is the basic salary. JW Marriott, Taj Bengal, and ITC hotels come for our placements. In the previous year, about 89% of students got internships. We can go abroad after getting the job. Incentives are also with the job, depending on whether you are working hard or not.
review_content.Infrastructure: From the library, we can get every type of book we want. Hostel facilities are provided at Rs. 7000 per month.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Hotel Management - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure may not be good, but placement wise, it is okay.

review_content.Placements: The college is good, regarding placement, it has properties across India that are mostly five-star. Good positions are offered in the campus interviews. Proper exposure is given in to the practical world with good resources. There is a guarantee of 100 percent placement. They also offer several courses from abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is proper. The practical labs give a perfect exposure towards the real industry. During industrial training, a student gets the exact exposure of the work life, but it is just that there are a lot of hidden costs in the course. They have an excursion every year. For the first years, it is usually Goa, and there are also hotel visits and show around. The director is very polite and friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Hospitality Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A very bad college. I personally am not going to suggest this college to anyone.

content.Placements: There is no placement till date. The college is really bad in the education industry. The companies are not interested in this college. This is a money making college, they just want to make money from students and do not have any educational values. In the name of placement, they give a Rs. 10,000 or Rs. 12,000 monthly salary package. I think the earnings of a labourer are much better than this salary package.
content.Infrastructure: The college has no infrastructure, just a 5 floor building that looks like apartments. There is no campus. I think the kindergarten infrastructure is much better than this college. There is no Wi-Fi, only a small library, bad cell classrooms, and some labs with no equipment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Hospital Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Small classrooms, no proper facilities, and a poor hostel.

content.Placements: In my course, approximately 50 percent of students were placed. The highest package was 8 LPA, the lowest package was 5 LPA, and the average package was 3 LPA. There are no companies for my course. About 60 percent of students from my course received internship opportunities in Desun Hospital, ILS Hospital, and BM Biral Hospital. There are no rules or offers for my course.
content.Infrastructure: In my college classrooms were small and there was no proper Wi-Fi connection. We did not have a dedicated library, and only a few computers were available which was not sufficient for students. Hostel facilities were very basic with small rooms and the mess food was repetitive and often not of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: A very bad college. I personally am not going to suggest this college to anyone.
reviews.review_text: The college has no infrastructure, just a 5 floor building that looks like apartments. There is no campus. I think the kindergarten infrastructure is much better than this college. There is no Wi-Fi, only a small library, bad cell classrooms, and some labs with no equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Small classrooms, no proper facilities, and a poor hostel.
reviews.review_text: In my college classrooms were small and there was no proper Wi-Fi connection. We did not have a dedicated library, and only a few computers were available which was not sufficient for students. Hostel facilities were very basic with small rooms and the mess food was repetitive and often not of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: SBIHM Jatragachi campus is a very good college for me. I think it will also be good for you.
reviews.review_text: From the library, we can get every type of book we want. Hostel facilities are provided at Rs. 7000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure may not be good, but placement wise, it is okay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is proper. The practical labs give a perfect exposure towards the real industry. During industrial training, a student gets the exact exposure of the work life, but it is just that there are a lot of hidden costs in the course. They have an excursion every year. For the first years, it is usually Goa, and there are also hotel visits and show around. The director is very polite and friendly.

The worst college one can ever be with. The faculty members are average, but the management is pathetic. I had to pay for my semester fee two times because they did not keep any record of it. I  do not know if they are running an institute or a fraud. My family was traumatized because of them. It is a total waste. The worst college one can ever be with. The faculty members are average, but the management is pathetic. I had to pay for my semester fee two times because they did not keep any record of it. I  do not know if they are running an institute or a fraud. My family was traumatized because of them. It is a total waste.

reviews.review_heading: I don’t recommend this college at all.
reviews.review_text: I didnt take the hostel facilities but the overall infrastructure was good. There were AC rooms, but we had to alternate. One day we got AC rooms, and the next day non-AC. After paying that amount of money, it was not worth it at all, and there was only a little cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: If you are joining this college remember thats you have to be focused on your studies
reviews.review_text: Our college didn?t have a hostel,the classes were very big where at-least 100 students could make place for their selves.we had a library, computer lab and each subjects had its personal training room where we could learn about the hotels and their curriculum

reviews.review_heading: Moderate college with high feels.
reviews.review_text: College looks more like a flat from outside but classrooms are well maintained. Practical labs are well-equipped. Canteen is not available. Any other sports related facilities are not available. No medical facilities available. Hostels are also not available.

reviews.review_heading: Subhash Bose Institute of Hotel Management & Hospital .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good in this institute; they provide Wi-Fi, computer lab, canteen, library, an inquiry department, a decision-making class room, and hostel facilities. There are many sports like cricket, football, etc. There are medical departments available to help the students, and the food quality is good; they provide food like house.

reviews.review_heading: Great place to learn & make career.
reviews.review_text: State of the art infrastructure. The food Production lab is fully equipped with imported equipment. Advanced Training Kitchen, Bakery lab, Front office lab also provided. There is well-equipped training restaurant capacity of 60 seater. The canteen facilities are awesome.

reviews.review_heading: Life at SBIHM is very interesting.
reviews.review_text: The food production lab is completely equipped with imported equipment, and it has a seating capacity of 40 students. There is a well-equipped training restaurant. Laundry facilities are available for every student in the training period for guest room management. The canteen facility is awesome.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

faqs.answer: A:    Eklavya Dental College and Hospital courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as DCI. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Eklavya Dental College and Hospital goes up to 100.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Eklavya Dental College and Hospital for all courses combined?

reviews_list.review_title: It is worth it because the degree they provide is totally worth in this field.

review_content.Placements: As we know, dentistry doesn't have a placement system. As your experience grows, you grow. It is a totally worthwhile experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not as good as we expect. If we talk about facilities, I would rate it a 3. The library is quite good, and the classrooms are also decent, but I think the labs need improvement. They need to notice for equipment and instruments. Overall, it is worth it.
review_content.Faculty: I must say that faculty is good. Exams are a little tough. Faculty is best and makes you understand everything. University exams are little tough and the maximum percentage is 74-76%. You have to study hard for university exams, but overall, they are not that much tough.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Eklavya Dental College and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides internships on its own at a very low fee, and even sometimes for free of cost. The hospital is also attached to our college, so we can see different types of medical cases and also can study from them. For jobs, placements are conducted every year. There is the best environment, and there is an interaction between seniors and juniors.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college hospital is good, and the hostel is situated near the college. The hostel has a food facility, and the food menu changes every day. The food served is hygienic, and in the hostel, workers clean the rooms every day. So, there is no need to clean the rooms on your own, and there is a 24x7 light facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: If you scored less in NEET and have a low budget, then you can prefer this college.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements from the college, but you can join as an assistant dentist or junior professor. They pay only 10k to both but provide accommodation with food. You will get a few patients in the endo department, a few in periodontics, and 1-2 in the OS department. Patient flow is less in the hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are no facilities in the college and hostel, it's just a normal college. Hostel rooms are okay, and the mess provides good food sometimes. The college has a canteen but not with all necessities. There are grounds for cricket, other than that, there are no sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: College is good in study & practical work. Mess food is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available in college is dental hospital are 8 dental departments, a lecture hall with projector, library with approximately every book of dentistry, canteen, playground of different sports, etc. In the hostel, a room is shared by 3 students & every student has their bed, a study table and an almirah. The quality of the mess is good & food is available.

reviews.review_heading: It is worth it because the degree they provide is totally worth in this field.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not as good as we expect. If we talk about facilities, I would rate it a 3. The library is quite good, and the classrooms are also decent, but I think the labs need improvement. They need to notice for equipment and instruments. Overall, it is worth it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Eklavya Dental College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college hospital is good, and the hostel is situated near the college. The hostel has a food facility, and the food menu changes every day. The food served is hygienic, and in the hostel, workers clean the rooms every day. So, there is no need to clean the rooms on your own, and there is a 24x7 light facility.

reviews.review_heading: If you scored less in NEET and have a low budget, then you can prefer this college.
reviews.review_text: There are no facilities in the college and hostel, it's just a normal college. Hostel rooms are okay, and the mess provides good food sometimes. The college has a canteen but not with all necessities. There are grounds for cricket, other than that, there are no sports facilities.

review_content.Placements: There is no need for campus placement in the college because all students get placed very well as they pass out. college_info.intro:
Seacom Skills University offers a variety of programmes including graduate, postgraduate, and diploma courses. The School of Engineering is one of the schools of SSU that offers programs in different domains including Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering.
Seacom Skills University is famous for its popular programmes, namely BE/BTech and BSc. Mechanical Engineering students are taught construction testing, design, and operation of machines & automobiles, and others. Seacom Skills University BSc students are taught to express and enhance the core analytical, technical, and conceptual skills that are appropriate for the hospitality industry. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Seacom Skills University Bolpur and their respective eligibility and SSU Bolpur fee structure:

placements.overview: Seacom Skills University Bolpur offers placement assistance to students. Placement Cell coordinates campus interviews with reputable organisations throughout India. The college plans corporate standards workshops, technical seminars, and sessions. They regularly invite industry professionals to share the most recent technological advancements and business practices with the students. Sri Ranganathar Institute of Engineering and Technology is visited by top companies for placements such as Indiamart, Intellipaat, Lead Height, Maruti Suzuki, Max View, Mayansh, Pnb MetLife, MedPlus, and Punam Energy, among others. As per Shiksha reviews, around 70-85% of students get placed in good companies.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for M.Tech at Seacom Skills University?
overview_faqs.answer: A variety of subjects are covered in the M.Tech programmes at Seacom Skills University (SSU) in Birbhum, West Bengal, India, including civil engineering, computer Science and engineering, electrical engineering, and environmental engineering. For two years, the annual tuition fee for these programmes is INR 1.40 lakhs. The entire course cost for the Civil Engineering programme is INR 1.60 lakhs, plus an additional INR10,000 one-time admission fee. Students can pursue specialised education in their chosen field thanks to this fee structure, which will prepare them for jobs in academia, industry, or research. SSU works hard to give its students a top-notch education and help them develop real-world skills so they can graduate prepared to face the demands of their respective fields.

overview_faqs.question: Does Seacom Skills University refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: Seacom Skills University does not refund fee at all as fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. This is the college policy. It includes Admission fee of Rs 10 thousand as well as semester fee. The total semester fee is 36000*6 and Rs 10000 one time admission. It also charges 1000 Rs exam fee.

admission_overview.college_name: Seacom Skills University Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, Fee & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Seacom Skills University admissionis open for all UG, PG, doctoral, and certificate courses. Admission to the university is merit and entrance-based. The college offers various courses in Engineering, Management, Commerce, and Pharmacy among others. The university includes BTech, BCom, MTech, etc. Seacom Skills University is accepting application forms for all its courses via online and offline modes. Candidates willing to apply forSeacom Skills Universityadmission 2025are required to apply online by visiting the university's official website. Read below to know more about the Geeta University admission, along with courses-wise eligibility, and selection:

Seacom Skills Universityis offering admission to all UG, PG, certificate and PhD courses. The application form is available online on the official website of the university and candidates can also visit the university campus to fill out the application form. Below are the top Seacom Skills University courses along with the eligibility criteria and selection criteria:
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreSeacom Skills Universitycourses

Seacom Skills Universityadmission procedure has a multi-step process, which has to be fulfilled by the candidates to get admission. It starts with the application, candidates are required to apply and appear for the respective entrance exam and counselling for the BTech course. Additionally, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria to get direct admission to the courses. Find below theSeacom Skills Universityadmission process 2025:
Step 1:Seacom Skills UniversityApplication Process 2025

Candidates looking for admission toSeacom Skills Universitymust apply for the entrance exam accepted by OP Jindal University Raigarh for admission to BTech courses. Additionaly, candidates are also required to register themselves by visiting the official website of college or visit the university campus in person.
Step 2:Seacom Skills UniversitySelection Criteria

After applying for the entrance exam accepted by the university for admission to BTech , students are required to appear for the same to fill out the selection criteria for admission. Additionally, for other courses, candidates are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria which include that UG candidates must pass Class 10 and Class 12 and PG candidates must have a graduation degree from a recognised institute or university.
Step 3:Seacom Skills UniversityCounselling
For admission to BTech courses, it is mandatory to appear for the WBJEE counselling round accepted by the university for the allocation of seats.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation

After the final round, the university releases the merit list based on the counselling round. The candidates who get shortlisted in the counselling round are required to submit the admission fee to lock in the final seat. If the candidate doesn’t paySeacom Skills Universityfeeby the stipulated date, the admission will be deemed cancelled.

reviews.review_heading: Seacom Skills University is the best autonomous university in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good. Here, you can enjoy the vibes of Santiniketan. The hostel is also good for students. The food is average in the hostel and also in the college canteen. Otherwise, the university infrastructure is very good. On the university campus, you can enjoy many types of games like cricket, football, tennis, carrom board, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of placement and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: All necessary equipment is available for lab work. The labs are neat and clean. Wi-Fi is available. All syllabus books are available in the library. Classrooms are bigger in size. Digital boards and smart classrooms are available. Spacious classrooms and library.

reviews.review_heading: This review help for everyone.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very modern infrastructure. Classrooms and labs are good and very secure with High quality CCTV Camera. A Central Library is available for in this college. The canteen food quality is good and healthy. Emergency medical facilities is available for 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: This college review is helpful for everyone.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very eye-catching. The entire college campus is covered by high-quality CCTV. The whole campus has high-speed Wi-Fi. The lab is very well-furnished with air conditioning. The library is stocked with suitable books for all departments.

reviews.review_heading: I am a 2nd year student in this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is outstanding. Our college campus is fully surrounded by a high-speed WiFi network. Labs are very well furnished and air conditioned. Classrooms are big. The whole college campus is covered by high-quality CCTV cameras. The quality of food is available.

reviews.review_heading: This review will help everyone.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very beautiful. Wi-Fi is available on our college campus. Labs are good. The classroom is very big and clean. In our college hostel is not available. In the canteen, food is very tasty and food is very refreshing. Medical facilities are available 24 hours a day for any emergency cases.

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the best college in West Bengal and it will teach you the value of life.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. The campus is much bigger and spacious. All classes are spacious. Library and e-library are available. Well-structured and very better labs operation system available. Playground is available and the sports system is good. The food quality is better and hygiene also.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a great college because it is under MAKAUT.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is available only for marine students. Every balcony has a Wi-Fi router. Lab facilities are available. It has a very good canteen. The food is very tasty and affordable. It has a huge playground. There are many plants.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good university with fine placements and internships.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There are lots of books in the library. In the hostel, there is a Wi-Fi facility. Many laboratories are provided in universities. The food served in the canteen is good. University organized many sports and game events which are great. There is a greenhouse advanced laboratory in our university.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students with a normal package for middle-class family students.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are clean also students have free Wi-Fi high-speed internet. Our college laboratories are well maintained and they have all the facilities students need. Our college has a canteen and hostels are also provided. Both of canteen has more than 50 menus and all the menus taste well. The hostels are well written and the hostel food order is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Seacom Skills University - SSU.
reviews.review_text: Quality is very good and top level. Laboratories and classrooms are neat and clean, and laboratories are well-equipped and eco-friendly. Labs are full of necessary machines and chemicals. Classrooms are airy. Hostels are very good, and you would be fully satisfied with the canteen food.

reviews.review_heading: Very good faculty members, teaching staffs, also have advanced labs, canteen food is great.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is provided, labs are very advanced, each and every instrument are present for practical works. Books are available in the library all the time. The canteen is awesome and the food is very healthy. Sports and other co-curricular activities are also performed.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Seacom Skills University.
reviews.review_text: Seacom Skills University also offers good quality facilities and infrastructure. It is the best eco-friendly campus, and the labs are very clean and airy. Labs have all the necessary chemicals and machines. Hostels are very good, and the food is healthy.

reviews.review_heading: It is a recommended university. Our college provides good placements and beautiful surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. Our new canteen has many food items like egg toast, bread butter, rice, curry, chicken, egg, etc. Labs are good, and it has many new instruments. All pharmacy lab instruments are modern. Students can learn many things. The library has many books for every course. There is a huge playground and a beautiful pond.

college_info.college_name: Seacom Skills University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Seacom Skills University - SSU provides a variety of Undergrad courses.

The fee structure of Seacom Skills University in 2023-2024 is INR 25,000/ for School Of Commerce And Management Studies (Semester Fees).The fees of School Of Pharmacy is around INR 60,000/ (Semester Fees). As the fees structures are medium to high at Seacom Skills University so their Placements are also good for the candidates who took admission in this University. The highest salary package offered by the University is 3 to 3.5 LPA. and the lowest salary package offered by the various companies is 2 to 2.5 LPA. Altough these packages are according to the courses that done by the students.

Seacom Skills University does not refund fee at all as fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. This is the college policy. It includes Admission fee of Rs 10 thousand as well as semester fee.
The total semester fee is 36000*6 and Rs 10000 one time admission. It also charges 1000 Rs exam fee.

Scholarships including 100%, 50%, and 25% are offered by Seacom Skills University (SSU) in Birbhum, India. Students can also apply for scholarships from state and federal governments. For example, students enrolling in undergraduate courses like UG-Science and other professional degrees approved by the UGC must have obtained at least 75% on their most recent qualifying test in order to be eligible for a scholarship worth INR 1,500.  There are over a dozen distinct types of scholarships available at SSU. These kinds of scholarship programs directly aid a large number of SSU students, especially those from economically poor homes or those with physical limitations.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the course and faculty, with student-related issues, and very less placements.

review_content.Placements: About 30-40% of students secure placements. The highest package that I know is 40 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Bajaj Finance, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Birla, and Tata. 40-50% of students get placed in Infinity Solutions. Job roles offered are website development, software development, Android app development, data analytics, and AI/ML.
review_content.Infrastructure: College provides Wi-Fi, labs with good quality computers, and air-conditioned classrooms. Labs have central AC. There is a huge library with almost 50,000 to 60,000 books and it is on 2 floors. There are around 900-1000 computers with a powerful network. However, there are some issues with the high-speed network if there is a lot of load. There will be a network issue with mobile networks in some places.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the campus life and atmosphere.

review_content.Placements: Around 30-40% of students only get placements, and that too at very low packages. The lowest package is around 1.5 LPA. The highest package is around 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Niotechone, Victasoft, 9brainz, Appmeddy, and Whitepearl. Internship options are most probably zero from the university side. You have to find it on your own.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided but there are constant connectivity issues. It has slow speed and sometimes even the Wi-Fi doesn't get connected. PCs in the lab are lagging and slow. Classrooms are good but there is a barrier, that boys and girls should not sit together, even though we are in college. The library is good, but it also has slow Wi-Fi issues.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for a two-year MBA at Atmiya University?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee for the Atmiya University MBA for the whole two-year course duration ranges from INR 1.8 Lacs to INR 3.2 lakh. Thus, the aspirants have to remit this course fee in order to confirm their admission.NOTE: The aforementioned fee structure is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. overview_faqs.question: Does Atmiya University refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the admitted students can cancel their admission before the deadline prescribed by the central admission committee and the university as per the rule university will return your fees.

review_summary.college_name: Atmiya University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (Integrated) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best university in Rajkot.

content.Placements: As we are studying currently no placements, but our seniors were placed. The package we will get is I think around 10 LPA to 20 LPA, which is quite good in this type of course. Every semester we have to do an internship, and we have fun while doing it.
content.Infrastructure: The best classrooms are provided with good ventilation and modern technology. The food is very good. Sports sessions are also in our curriculum. Medical facilities are also provided which is a good service.
content.Faculty: The teachers teaching us are very good with good behavior. Teachers are very good at teaching with the treasure of knowledge. Teaching quality and style is the best. Teachers explain with real-life examples. Course curriculum is also good to make students industry-ready. Semester examinations are somewhat difficult. Pass percentage is 95%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I choose this course for a good job.

content.Placements: There are many students. In BCA, almost 800 students enrolled, but you do not think that how many will be placed. Placements would help nearly 10/12 persons. Other will be not be placed. Approximately 2/3% of students will be placed hardly.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are nice, but one thing is the worst that the internet accessibility at the college is poor. I pay Rs. 60,000 per year for the BCA course, but they do not provide adequate materials. I’m often forced to purchase materials separately, and assignments that are required by the university are not provided either, placing additional costs on us.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the course and faculty, with student-related issues, and very less placements.

content.Placements: About 30-40% of students secure placements. The highest package that I know is 40 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Bajaj Finance, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Birla, and Tata. 40-50% of students get placed in Infinity Solutions. Job roles offered are website development, software development, Android app development, data analytics, and AI/ML.
content.Infrastructure: College provides Wi-Fi, labs with good quality computers, and air-conditioned classrooms. Labs have central AC. There is a huge library with almost 50,000 to 60,000 books and it is on 2 floors. There are around 900-1000 computers with a powerful network. However, there are some issues with the high-speed network if there is a lot of load. There will be a network issue with mobile networks in some places.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the campus life and atmosphere.

content.Placements: Around 30-40% of students only get placements, and that too at very low packages. The lowest package is around 1.5 LPA. The highest package is around 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Niotechone, Victasoft, 9brainz, Appmeddy, and Whitepearl. Internship options are most probably zero from the university side. You have to find it on your own.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided but there are constant connectivity issues. It has slow speed and sometimes even the Wi-Fi doesn't get connected. PCs in the lab are lagging and slow. Classrooms are good but there is a barrier, that boys and girls should not sit together, even though we are in college. The library is good, but it also has slow Wi-Fi issues.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure but the faculty needs improvements.

content.Placements: There are many students. In BCA, almost 800 students enrolled, so you think about how much will be placed because the placement percentage is nearly 10-12%. Others will be not able to be placed. Almost 2-3% of students got placed hardly.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are nice, but one thing is the worst which is the internet. It is not accessible in college. I pay Rs. 60,000 per year for BCA. But after all, the faculty does not provide materials. I want to buy materials separately. Materials are not included in fees. The faculty requires assignments on university pages. It is not provided by the university. This cost will be on us.

admission_overview.college_name: Atmiya University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application Process

paragraphs: Atmiya University is a private institution with seven faculties offering more than49 coursesat UG, PG diploma and PhD levels. The university provides programmes inEngineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Health Sciences, Medicine, Law, Education and Liberal Arts. The University also offers PhD programmes in Engineering, Science, Pharmacy and Management.
Admissions are granted either onmerit basisor throughstate and national-level entrance exams. The mode of application isonline.
Eligibility & Selection Criteria

Selection process for most UG and PG programmes aremerit-basedwhile others require a valid score in entrance exams. For PhD, students should appear for theuniversity-level entrance exam - AUMPETfollowed by an interview. Students who have qualified for national or state-level entrance tests such asCSIR-NET, GATE, GPAT or UGC-NETare exempted from the university level exam.
The fee and average package offered are presented below:
Seat intake at Atmiya University is differenet across courses and disciplines, which is presented here:

The admission process includes filling the online application form. The section process is entrance and merit based, depending upon the course. For courses such as BTech, MBA, MCA and BPharm, entrance exam scores are accepted. Admission to BA, BSc, BBA and BCom is done on merit basis. Students should achieve the cutoff marks set by the University. All shortlisted students are required to attend the counselling process.
