cut_off.college_name: Atmiya University Cutoff 2025: Check GUJCET Round Wise Ranks

description: Atmiya University cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The Atmiya University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Atmiya University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 29459 and 50400 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Civil Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for the same

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 29459 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Information Technology and with closing cutoff ranks of and , respecti

Atmiya University accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Atmiya University can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Atmiya University GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
For the General HS category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 14988 to 38988. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was , followed by . These branches

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.
In the final round for the General HS category, the Atmiya University B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 14988 to 38988, wherein the toughest branch was B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering.

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. Aspirants aiming for admission to the next academic session can refer to the table provided below to know the important GUJCET 2026 dates.

Provided below are the GUJCET last three years, i.e., 2025, 2024 and 2023 cutoff data for all rounds for students to compare and get a better understanding of the admission changes and trends over the years, so that they have a better comprehension of how to prepare for their admissions for the upcoming year.

videos.title: Atmiya Institute of Pharmacy, Rajkot -College Review by the Students
Atmiya Institute of Pharmacy, Rajkot -College Review by the Students

hostel.description: The Institute has magnificently designed separate hostels for boys each with all modern facilities, for boarding and other recreational activities. The hostels have their own mess to provide good and hygienic food to the students. Well-furnished and spacious rooms are there for 350+ boys. There are cubical as well as dormitories for the students. Each room is well-equipped with a bed, a study table, study chair, almirah and an easy chair. The mess is maintained on a co-operative basis. Both hostels have common rooms, gyms, volleyball ground and cricket ground. Spacious common rooms are provided in all the hostels, which are a place for constructive activities like indoor games, discussions and get together within the hostel. Indoor games like carom board, chess, table tennis are provided on the campus. There is a separate Badminton court in both the hostels and sports equipment is provided from the hostel’s sports committee. The hostel provides the students with daily newspapers and various magazines to make them aware of the daily happenings of the world.

library.description: The Library and Learning Centre (LLC) spreads over to ground plus 3 floors. It is centrally air-conditioned, well-protected with fire alarm CCTV surveillance. It has specialized collections of books, journals and other resources in Sciences, Engineering and Technology, Humanities, Social Sciences and Management ranging from printed books, e-books, Kindle e-book readers, back volumes and CDs\DVDs. The LLC subscribes to national and international journals in print and e-journals. The LLC has a video conferencing facility and NPTEL video courses. The LLC is using NewGenLib software for library automation with WEB-OPAC (Online Public Access Catalogue), an online search facility. There are many learning activities conducted by the LLC, one such being the MakerSpace which provides an environment to develop an idea into a prototype. The LLC stays well connected with all the departments and centers on the campus.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Ground, Handball, Kho-Kho, Athletics

reviews.review_text: College provides Wi-Fi, labs with good quality computers, and air-conditioned classrooms. Labs have central AC. There is a huge library with almost 50,000 to 60,000 books and it is on 2 floors. There are around 900-1000 computers with a powerful network. However, there are some issues with the high-speed network if there is a lot of load. There will be a network issue with mobile networks in some places.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the campus life and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided but there are constant connectivity issues. It has slow speed and sometimes even the Wi-Fi doesn't get connected. PCs in the lab are lagging and slow. Classrooms are good but there is a barrier, that boys and girls should not sit together, even though we are in college. The library is good, but it also has slow Wi-Fi issues.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but the faculty needs improvements.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are nice, but one thing is the worst which is the internet. It is not accessible in college. I pay Rs. 60,000 per year for BCA. But after all, the faculty does not provide materials. I want to buy materials separately. Materials are not included in fees. The faculty requires assignments on university pages. It is not provided by the university. This cost will be on us.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, and education but average placement.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were not available, so students had to stay near the college. Transportation was available in the nearby city. The library was good, and the classrooms were not fully air-conditioned. Only normal classrooms were available. Air-conditioned classrooms were located in another building, the Virani building. The labs were good enough.

reviews.review_heading: As I told above, you can read my review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. But because this institute is driven by Swaminarayan Gurukul, college life is not good. The canteen facility is very poor. I don't live in the hostel, but as per my knowledge, the hostel is good. The food is Jain food across the whole campus, and even the canteen also has only Jain food.

reviews.review_heading: Make bright future with us.
reviews.review_text: In my college, specific courses have specific labs like the Microbiology lab, Chemistry lab, PGDMLT lab, research lab, and many more labs. There is also a big library. There is only a boys' hostel. My college has separate boys' and girls' canteens. Sports-related, culture-related, and many more extracurricular activity-related clubs are there.

reviews.review_heading: Good college infrastructure with school-type system.
reviews.review_text: Multiple labs for every department with high-end configuration systems and internet accessibility with internet ID/password security. Lab security is high with multiple cameras in labs. There is a big lobby for the lab with wooden floors and AC facilities. It's a good place.

reviews.review_heading: It has strong academics with vibrant campus life and industry focus.
reviews.review_text: Atmiya University offers modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library. Hostels provide clean and spacious rooms. It has basic amenities with hygienic and nutritious food served in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are readily available, ensuring student health and safety. Sports and recreational facilities, including playgrounds and indoor games. It promote physical fitness and leisure, creating a balanced environment for academic an...

reviews.review_heading: One day at ATMIYA with the student of ATMIYA.
reviews.review_text: There's a hostel facility for boys. There are 3 sharing rooms with a cleaning staff and mess and a healthy environment like fresh air and a clean atmosphere with the topping of trees and plants. Medical facilities are also available in the hostel for emergencies, and there are various pieces of equipment available for games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Atmiya College Review, It's Not So Good.
reviews.review_text: There is no doubt about our college infrastructure. The classrooms, the labs, and mainly our library are nice. Our college library has three floors with books related to each and every subject. Also, our college provides facilities for disabled people.

reviews.review_heading: Average Placements & Faculty Members, Outdated Curriculum, Good Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are pretty good. Wi-Fi is available across the whole campus. Computer labs are average but sufficient for development and other curriculum activities. Classrooms are pretty huge and well-lit. The best resource that you can use is the library at Atmiya. The library has 3 floors, including a reading room. The library offers an e-library section with lots of computers available for you from morning to evening.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good till this date, and it's an awesome college to explore yourself.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best library in our city with above 1 lacs+ books. There were good WiFi connections in each hostel room. The infrastructure of our college was good. The food of Mess is quite good, pure authentic Gujarat food and only vegetarians are included.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty members and campus life.
reviews.review_text: I'm not living in the hostel, but I have many friends who live in hostels. They tell me about hostel life in some words; the hostel is very comfortable, and the Wi-Fi is very fast, and the food is also hygienic. Sometimes I also have lunch with my friends, and it tastes very good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Atmiya University

likes.text: Many Companies live Infosys, Wipro and Tata Company comes for the Better placement of talented students.
The placements at Atmiya are very good, and well-reputed companies visit our college for recruitment.

college_info.college_name: Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview:
Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh is a private institute, established in 2002 in Bhimavaram, Andhra Pradesh. Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh is approved by DCI and offers a total of 9 courses at UG and PG levels in 7 specialisations such as Endodontics, Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Oral Medicine & Radiology, Oral Pathology and Orthodontics . Furthermore, it offer courses such as BDS and MDS in Full Time mode. Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 71,500 to 10,24,650. Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh has an annual seat intake of 141 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. As per the recent Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 5,66,667. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Q. What courses does Vishnu Dental College offer?

A. Vishnu Dental College offers nine courses in the field of Dental Science at UG and PG level. The courses are BDS, MDS and Diploma in Dental Mechanics.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied till now, and what wait, let’s see in future studies. Thank you.

review_content.Placements: 100 students are placed in my course. The highest package is approximately 40,000, the lowest 15,000, and the average about 25,000 to 30,000 per month. This is after completion of BDS undergraduation. There are no recruiting companies because the course deals with people and their moral health care. The under graduation is 5 years with an internship. In our campus, we have special satellite clinics all over major cities, and we get 100% internship from my course. The role is house surgeon in college.
review_content.Infrastructure: They provide college Wi-Fi throughout the campus, classrooms, and labs. We have digital study on our campus as we use smart learning with Apple iPads and digital classes. Our campus is one of the Apple Distinguished Colleges. We are provided with good liberty, and all the quality of facilities are up to our best standards. They have PhDs in their fields of departments. We have quality food in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are provided as we have our own Vishnu Dental Hospital nearby. We have sports events every year and daily games.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: BDS at VDC is worth the fees.

review_content.Placements: A total of 100 seats are available for this course. It is based on NEET rank, and we need to apply it in counseling. There will be a mandatory internship for one year, and you will get opportunities to work in the satellite clinics of VDC, which will make you well trained for real clinics.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is one of the best thing you can get exposed to different new systems and current trends in dentistry . There is AC library and free Wi-Fi, a sterilization unit, a laser department and many more so that we can get accustomed to current trends.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good roller coaster experience of mixed emotions and memories for a lifetime. Absolutely satisfied.

review_content.Placements: I belong to the batch of 2019-20, with a total of 100 students admitted. Everyone from our batch is graduating. We are given good clinical exposure in our hospital. People who are interested in working in rural areas are given a salary and are posted in rural satellite clinics set up by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the departments are well-equipped with advanced technologies such as advanced microscopes in Oral Pathology, state-of-the-art lab equipment in Prosthodontics like CAD-CAM, digital intraoral scanners, model scanners, 3D printers in Orthodontics, OPG, CBCT in Oral Medicine, and a well-equipped operation theater in Oral Surgery, etc. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the usage of digital dentistry includes Vaidhyo, the online portal of the college where patient data is protected.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good experience and absolutely satisfied with our college.

review_content.Placements: In our college there are a total of 100 students in each batch divided into three sub-batches of 30 students each. Our college has 42 satellite clinics, and after completing the course, we are allowed to work there, which is very helpful and a great opportunity to improve our working skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and great facilities. We have a well-infrastructured library with lots of useful books, lecture halls for classes, and well-infrastructured labs which contain CAD CAM machines, intraoral scanners, CBCT, etc. The hostels are neat and clean, accommodating three persons per room with Wi-Fi.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty, good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 100 percent of students are placed in our college with good packages. Vishnu Dental Care employs almost 60-70 percent of our graduates, and there are opportunities for abroad placements as well. We have access to clinical setups and teaching faculties that allow us to work in satellite clinics and prepare for competitive examinations.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are excellent. The teaching is effective, providing useful information about subjects and clinical skills. The infrastructure is good, and the environment is healthy. Small group teaching is very beneficial. The hostel rooms are good, the food is satisfactory, and we have access to a canteen, ground, and gym.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college if you want to be a dentist.

review_content.Placements: The college has a few satellite clinics where interns get a chance to work for three to four months and gain clinical exposure. The college does not provide any placements, as no medical or dental college typically offers placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good number of facilities, such as labs, a library, Wi-Fi, a playground, clinics, CBCT, CAD-CAM machines, intraoral scanners, and central sterilization ensuring patient safety. The college also has a canteen, hostels, and a mess. There is a doctor available who provides consultation for students.

review_summary.college_name: Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied till now, and what wait, let’s see in future studies. Thank you.

content.Placements: 100 students are placed in my course. The highest package is approximately 40,000, the lowest 15,000, and the average about 25,000 to 30,000 per month. This is after completion of BDS undergraduation. There are no recruiting companies because the course deals with people and their moral health care. The under graduation is 5 years with an internship. In our campus, we have special satellite clinics all over major cities, and we get 100% internship from my course. The role is house surgeon in college.
content.Infrastructure: They provide college Wi-Fi throughout the campus, classrooms, and labs. We have digital study on our campus as we use smart learning with Apple iPads and digital classes. Our campus is one of the Apple Distinguished Colleges. We are provided with good liberty, and all the quality of facilities are up to our best standards. They have PhDs in their fields of departments. We have quality food in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are provided as we have our own Vishnu Dental Hospital nearby. We have sports events every year and daily games.

reviews.review_text: Good college infrastructure and facilities are available with wifi, labs, classrooms, and library. Hostel facilities are good with a hygienic environment; quality of food is excellent, with availability of different varieties of food items in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Vishnu College has the best technology and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have high-speed internet all over campus. For patients, there is a water purifier every 100 meters. Facilities include a gym, tennis court, shuttle court, volleyball court, and cricket ground. Each classroom has only 34 students for small-group teaching.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with our college with respect to quality education.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at Vishnu Dental College like the classrooms, labs and clinic which were separated by respective blocks are good. VDC wifi is available everywhere on campus and can be used for educational purposes. There were messes and canteens about every 50 steps, and the costs were affordable for most of us. We had medical physicians, lab technicians, and psychologists. For those interested in sports, there were practitioners to guide us.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: We have a well-established library and well-equipped labs. The college also has a small group teaching approach, which helps students get more individual attention. The infrastructure includes CBCT, 3D printers, intraoral scanners, and milling machines. The classrooms are well-equipped for hands-on activities, and e-learning is available. The faculty is very experienced and provides guidance at every step. The comprehensive clinic system helps students gain clinical exposure.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure has good and well maintained buildings. The library is spacious and has a good collection of books. WiFi is available throughout the campus. The mess and canteen provide good quality food. Medical facilities are available on campus. There are facilities for sports and games including a playground. The hostel rooms are spacious and clean. I had a good experience at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with good infrastructure and peaceful campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has wifi in every lecture hall. The lecture halls have chairs and benches that are arranged in small groups, which makes them more comfortable for students. The college also has a great library that is open from 9am to 10pm. Each department has its own lab. The college also has a canteen that serves fresh food, Maggie points, juice shops, and tea leaf.

reviews.review_heading: Best college - Vishnu Dental College Andhra pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure, including WiFi and air-conditioned classrooms, a library, and smart teaching. The mess and canteen provide quality food, and there are many indoor and outdoor sports that students can play, which improves their competitive nature.

reviews.review_heading: College is equipped with qualified doctors, advanced equipment, greenery.
reviews.review_text: The college is equipped with modern infrastructure facilities like wifi networks, well-equipped laboratories with recent advancements in machinery, libraries with a variety of journals and competitive books, learning halls, and computer systems. Hostels are neat and clean, and food is provided on time.

reviews.review_heading: A holistic college experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is fully furnished with all amenities and top-notch security for the students. The food is good, and the grounds make us feel at home. There is even a salon and cafes to cater to your needs. The college has state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the latest technologies to aid in holistic modern learning for all students. The clinics are designed for patient comfort and operate very efficiently. All the pre-clinical labs are fully furnished, so students don't have to wait their turn ...

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of campus, crowd, surroundings, and faculty.

review_content.Placements: 85% students are placed in our course, which is nice. No package is given to our college; it's totally a self-placed college but also has many plus points. There isn't any company. 25% of students get internships through the college. Quality assurance, pharmacist, manager, etc. are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs are nice, classrooms have smart classes, projectors, ACs, and libraries are available. The hostel is quite nice, the quality of the food is very good, a sports complex is available on campus, and the campus has its own hospital. Sports week is also celebrated, during which we can play our favourite sports and win prizes.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The largest campus contains a wide variety of courses, all in one.

review_content.Placements: We have about 125 students in the course of a Bachelor of Pharmacy. The highest package offered is 2.9 L per annum and the lowest package offered is 1.7 L per annum. All the students 125/125 got internships in companies like Torrent, Intas, Ratnaris, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi on the whole campus, along with good computer labs and a library. The library contains more than 50 lakh rupees of books. And have the best of the best books by the most famous authors for each and every subject. Hostel facilities are very good, as they have many advantages.

review_summary.college_name: Shree S.K. Patel College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research, Ganpat University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied and there are good placements.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 7 LPA. Recruiting companies are Zydus Medicinal Industry, Cadila Medicinal Industry, Sunflower Medicinal Industry, Corona Industry, and Toronto Apolo Medicinal Industry. The average is 8 CGPA. The companies mentioned above and also other companies, are available in our college, like 50 above company industries.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is beautiful and green, and the atmosphere is also good. They also have a big library with AC classroom. Wi-Fi is available on all campus. Hostel facilities are good, but food is average in mess. Medical facilities are too good and sports are also too good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with my college. The faculty is very nice and helpful.

content.Placements: About 80% of students were placed in our class. There is no package provided by our college. Cipla, Biotin, etc. are the top recruiters. 10% of students got internships in some Indian local companies. Lab technician, lab assistant, quality control, pharmacist, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in classes; they are all smart classes; the library is decent; there is no such availability of air conditioning. Hostels are fine, quality of food is good, sports are only played in sports week once a year, and there is a small clinic in the university.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of campus, crowd, surroundings, and faculty.

content.Placements: 85% students are placed in our course, which is nice. No package is given to our college; it's totally a self-placed college but also has many plus points. There isn't any company. 25% of students get internships through the college. Quality assurance, pharmacist, manager, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs are nice, classrooms have smart classes, projectors, ACs, and libraries are available. The hostel is quite nice, the quality of the food is very good, a sports complex is available on campus, and the campus has its own hospital. Sports week is also celebrated, during which we can play our favourite sports and win prizes.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The largest campus contains a wide variety of courses, all in one.

content.Placements: We have about 125 students in the course of a Bachelor of Pharmacy. The highest package offered is 2.9 L per annum and the lowest package offered is 1.7 L per annum. All the students 125/125 got internships in companies like Torrent, Intas, Ratnaris, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi on the whole campus, along with good computer labs and a library. The library contains more than 50 lakh rupees of books. And have the best of the best books by the most famous authors for each and every subject. Hostel facilities are very good, as they have many advantages.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Chasing a dream in Ganpat university.

content.Placements: In my class, there are more than 128 students, divided into 4 different batches. Our admission is based on ACPC, an admission criteria through which admission is held in our college. Lots of pharmaceutical companies come to our college and offer good jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Our whole university is infiltrated with Wi-Fi, and students can use it within the campus. Our library has special books like pharmacopeia, etc. During exam time, our library allows students to study even after the college hours. Our lab is fully equipped with instruments and chemicals, and every lab has a lab assistant. Our hostel has both AC and non-AC rooms. The quality of food served by our mess is very good, and every Sunday, we get special food that tastes extraordinary.

college_info.intro:
Indian Institute of Management Indore popular programmes are PGP-HRM and PGP. Indian Institute of Management–Indore (IIM–Indore) students will be able to develop critical thinking, and competence in quantitative Analysis, and prepare socially conscious and ethically motivated leaders, managers, and entrepreneurs. Students can also join skill development courses which include spreadsheet modeling, leadership, entrepreneurial orientation, communication, and others. IIM Indore students take part in various activities, extra and co-curricular activities which include Utsaha (Rural Marketing Fair) and IRIS (The Annual Management & Cultural Festival).
Indian Institute of Management Indore students are placed in top companies such as Cognizant, Deloitte, Accenture, and others. Below mentioned are some of the IIM Indore course admissions and their respective eligibility and IIM Indore MBA fees and IIM Indore fees:

Offered every semester
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Active but run mostly by students
Love being in college

faqs.answer: PGP is the flagship course of IIM Indore. PGP is accredited by the Association of MBAs, London (AMBA, UK based accreditation agency). Spread over six trimesters across two years, it is also inclusive of a summer project of an eight-week duration. Additionally, in the second year, the course covers electives, namely Information Systems, Marketing, Finance & Accounting, OB & HR, OM & QT, Economics, Communication, Humanities & Social Sciences and Strategy. Apart from the flagship PGP course, IIM Indore also offers a PGP in Human Resource Management (PGP HRM) to the students.

admission_overview.college_name: IIM Indore Course Admissions 2025: Cutoff, Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Application Process & Dates

admission_overview.title: IIM Indore Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Indian Institute of Management Indore admission 2025 are primarily entrance-based. This institute is known for its two-year, full-time, residential flagship PGP (also referred to as MBA) course. Admission to the MBA course is offered based on a valid score in CAT. The percentile of CAT for IIM Indore reached up to 98 percentile in the past years which shows how rigorous it is for a student to get admission to this institute. The IIM-I admission cycle for PGP starts with the commencement of CAT registrations. Apart from PGP, IIM Indore also offers EPGP, FPM, EPM, etc. Interested students can read the following article to know more.

eligibility_selection.title: IIM Indore Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Admissions are completely entrance-based for all IIM Indore courses. Students need to first clear the relevant national-level entrance exams, followed by the institute-level selection processes. Admission to the flagship PGP course is based on CAT scores, followed by Group Discussion, WAT, and Personal Interview. Find below IIM Indore eligibility and selection criteria for top courses:

courses_table.eligibility: UG degree or completed a professional degree (CA/ CS/ ICWA/ Fellow of the Institute of Actuaries of India (FIAI)) with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD)
courses_table.selection_criteria: CAT + PI + WAT + Class 10 & Class 12 marks + Diversity + Work Experience

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board

Four-year bachelor's degree in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate Or Three-year bachelor's degree and a master's degree in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate in each Or Five-year integrated course with a minimum 50% aggregate. And minimum of five years of managerial/ entrepreneurial/ professional experience after completion of bachelor's degree as on the application deadline
PG degree with 60% aggregate or Professional degree with 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD) from a recognised university
PG degree with 60% aggregate or professional degree with 60% aggregate from a recognised university + 5 years of experience
courses_table.selection_criteria: CAT/ GRE / GMAT / JRF (Economics) / GATE/ RAT | RAT + PI for E-FPMG

faqs.answer: IIMs consider two kinds of cutoffs for admission to their PGP programmes – qualifying and final shortlisting cutoff. The overall qualifying CAT cutoff required is 90 percentile for the General category for admission to the PGP course. For the PGP HRM course, the overall qualifying CAT cutoff is 70 percentile for the General category candidates. However, the final shortlisting cutoff percentile for CAT for IIM Indore reached up to 98 percentile in the past years which shows how rigorous it is for a student to get admission to this institute. For more cutoff-related information, click here. Predict here the chance of getting into IIM Indore MBA
faqs.question: How much score is required for IIM Indore MBA?

faqs.answer: GMAT score is one of the many data points considered for providing admission to IIM Indore. Given the emphasis on diversity, nature of work experience, educational background, statement of purpose, sponsorship status (sabbatical/industry sponsored) all these play a critical role in the selection of candidates. The admissions committee decides the cutoff every year. Currently, the institute accepts overall GMAT cutoff for providing admission. Candidates shortlisted based on GMAT score are further called for a personal interview round.
faqs.question: Is GMAT required for IIM Indore EMBA admission?

faqs.answer: The mode of Indian Institute of Management Indore course admissions is online. Admission to various courses is based on entrance exam scores and merit. The accepted entrance exams are CAT,  CAT,1 Indore, and others. Candidates applying through the CAT must first register for the CAT exam. Then appear for the CAT exam. Those who qualify for CAT must appear for the WAT, PI,  and other selection rounds. Then candidates will get an admission call according to their marks. Then students must report at the allotted and selected college.
faqs.question: How can candidates join IIM Indore?

paragraphs: Step 1: IIM Indore Application Process

Candidates need to apply for CAT for IIM Indore PGP/MBA course admission and to apply for other courses' admission, candidates need to visit the IIM Indore official website. For other courses, visit the official website - https://www.iima.ac.in/ and apply as per course requirements.
Step 2: IIM Indore Selection Rounds 2025

Appear for CAT or other relevant entrance exams accepted by IIM Indore for admission to its courses. For admission to the flagship PGP course, candidates need to appear for CAT and the shortlisted ones will be called for further rounds of selection, which include a personal interview round, a group discussion round and a written ability test.
For admission to IIM Indore, other courses, the selection process basically involves appearing for the relevant entrance test, such asIPMAT/GMAT/GRE/CAT/JRFfollowed by a personal interview round.
Step 3: IIM Indore Final Admission 2025

The final admission offers for IIM Indore PGP are made considering different components, such as previous academic record, CAT score, WAT/PI score and more. Learn more about theIIM Indore MBA Admission Criteria 2025.
Once the admission offers are finalised, candidates need to pay the admission acceptance fee to secure their admission

IIM Indore feefor various courses is inclusive of various components, such as tuition fee, library fee, internet fee, case permission royalty, course material, hostel room rent, service charge, medical insurance, etc. Components which are not included areService Tax and any other tax and caution deposits.Students can refer to the below-mentioned table to know more aboutIIM Indore course feeand ROI:

courses_data.name: IIM Indore MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IIM IndorePGPcourse is accredited by the European Quality Improvement System (EQUIS), the Association of Advance Collegiate Schools of Business (AACSB-US based accreditation agency), the Association of MBAs, London (AMBA, UK based accreditation agency), and the Association of Indian Universities.IIM Indore PGPis a full-time, two-year, residential programme equivalent to an MBA Degree. Apart from the flagship PGP course, IIM Indore also offers a PGP in Human Resource ManagementPGP HRMto the students.IIM Indore MBA admission 2025is entrance-based. Interested candidates need appear for the CAT entrance exam and meet the final CAT cutoff for rounds of selection. Interested candidates apply to IIM Indore PGP and register themselves on the official website of CAT once the registrations begin.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 50% in graduation. Can I get admission for MBA in IIM Indore?
faqs.answer: At IIM Indore, students are offered a full-time MBA programme in multiple specialisations. The institute accepts admission to MBA courses through national-level entrance exams such as CAT/ MAT/ XAT, followed by Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI) rounds. The basic requirement forIIM Indore MBA admissionis to pass graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university. courses_data.name: IIM Indore IPM Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The Integrated Programme in Management(IPM) offered at IIM Indoreis the first of its kind. It is a five-year course that combines undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in Management. The IPM course at IIM Indore is accredited by the Association of MBAs, London (4th and 5th year).Admission toIIM Indore IPMis entrance-based. Interested candidates who satisfy the minimum eligibility criteria, which is Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board, need to appear for IPMAT followed by a Written Ability Test and Personal Interview round. The table mentioned below showcases the components and the weightage given to them for making final admission offers:

faqs.question: What is the fee for IPM course at IIM, Indore?
faqs.answer: Indian Institute of Management Indore IPM fees is INR 35 lakh. The total fee mentioned here is sourced from unofficial sources. Hence, is indicative. For detailed fee structure, candidates are advised to contact the admission department of the institute. In addition to this, students who are willing to get into IIM Indore for this course are also required to pay the application fee for IPMAT. IPMAT 2023 application fees can be paid online through credit card/ debit card/ net banking. Check out t

faqs.question: How can I get admission at IIM Indore for IPM course?
faqs.answer: IPM course offered by IIM Indore is a five-year integrated Management programme that provides students a comprehensive understanding of the Business and Management industry. Designed to prepare students for a career in the corporate world in sectors, such as Consulting, and Entrepreneurship, the admission process for IPM at IIM Indore is highly competitive. For IIM Indore's IPM admission, candidates must visit the official website of the institute to apply online. Accredited by the Association o

faqs.question: Are admissions to IPM course at IIM Indore entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions to the IPM course offered at IIM Indore are entrance-based. Students are accepted to the course on the basis of valid score obtained by the candidates in theIPMATentrance test conducted by the institute. Students must meet theIPMAT cut-offdecided by the institute in order to secure a seat atIPM course in IIM Indore.

faqs.question: Are 10+2 level maths questions asked in IPMAT?
faqs.answer: After the Class 12 exam, the Integrated Programme in Management Aptitude Test (IPMAT) is one of the most competitive admission tests. The IPMAT exam typically has a moderate difficulty level. The three areas of the IPMAT question paper are Quantitative Aptitude (MCQs), Verbal Ability, and Quantitative Aptitude (SA). It is evident that QA (Math) makes up a significant portion of the IPMAT curriculum. This test measures your speed as well as your ability to select and answer the correct questions.

courses_data.name: IIM Indore FPM Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IIM Indore offers a PhD degree in the Fellow Programme in Management (FPM). It is a two-year course and costs around INR 5.5 lakh. The basic eligibility for the programme is a PG degree with a minimum aggregate of 60% or a Professional degree with a minimum aggregate of 60% (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD) from a recognised university. Admissions to theFPM course at IIM Indoreare done based on valid scores secured by the candidates in national-level entrance exams such as CAT/GRE/GMAT/JRF (Economics)/GATE.

faqs.question: What is the criteria for IIM Indore FPM?
faqs.answer: Indian Institute of Management Indore admission 2025 are primarily entrance-based. Admission to the MBA course is offered based on a valid score in CAT.  The IIM-I admission cycle for PGP starts with the commencement of CAT registrations. Apart from PGP, IIM Indore also offers EPGP, FPM, EPM, etc.

faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted for FPM admissions at IIM Indore?
faqs.answer: Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Indore accepts multiple national-level entrance exams for admission to its FPM course. The institute accepts valid scores obtained in the following exams:GMATGRECATGATE

faqs.question: What are the FPM specialisations offered at IIM Indore?
faqs.answer: At Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Indore, students can pursue Fellow Programme in Management (FPM). It is a two-year course offered at doctoral level. Students can pursue the programme in two specialisations; Fellow Programme in Management(FPM) Industryand Fellow Programme in Management (FPM) General. Interested students who satisfy the eligibility criteria of the course can visit the official website of IIM Indore to apply for the course by filling out the application form online.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the IIM Indore PGP course?
faqs.answer: For PGP admissions at IIM Indore, students must clear the accepted entrance exams such asCAT,IPMAT, and others. Students must visit the official website of the entrance exam such as CAT. Then appear for the CAT exam. Then appear for the selection round which includes WAT/PI, and others. Receive the admission call. Then report to the selected/allotted college.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in IIM Indore for MBA?
faqs.answer: The admission cycle for the flagship PGP courses of IIM-I starts in the month of August for the upcoming year's MBA admission batch. IIM Indore has adopted a three-stage selection process for admission to its PGP and PGP HRM programmes, which is as follows:Eligibility criteriaAll applicants must fulfil the eligibility requirements specified for PGP admission. A pass in any UG degree or completed a professional degree (CA/ CS/ ICWA/ FIAI) with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ PwD candidates) is required to apply for PGP course.Shortlist for PIOnly those aspirants satisfying the eligibility requirements will be shortlisted for PI round. Sufficient number of candidates for PI from each category will be shortlisted using the merit list generated based on composite score. Candidates shortlisted for PI will be intimated in the month of January 2023. Individual regret letters will not be sent to applicants who are not shortlisted for PI.Final SelectionAfter completion of the above sele

faqs.question: Are Class 12 marks important for IIM Indore?
faqs.answer: The weightage given to Class 12 marks while shortlisting candidates for the personal interview round is 40%, which is the highest among other factors. However, while preparing the final merit list after PI round for admission offers, the weightage of class 12 marks comes down to 10%. Hence, it can be concluded that having a good score in Class 12 is an advantage for candidates seeking admission to IIM Indore MBA.The other components considers for shortlisting for PI and final admission offers along with the weightage given are mentioned in the below table:Shortlisting for PI:ComponentsWeightageClass 1034%Class 1240%CAT20%Diversity6%For Final Admission Offers:ComponentsWeightageClass 1010%Class 1210%CAT20%PI Score40%Note:The numbers above are taken from the IIM Indore PGP Admission 2023 brochure.

faqs.question: Is CAT compulsory for IIM Indore?
faqs.answer: The answer is both yes and no. IIM Indore admission for the postgraduate and doctoral-level Management courses, i.e., PGP, PGP-HRM, FPM and E-FPM programmes is completely based on CAT scores followed by a PI round. The percentile of CAT for IIM Indore has gone up to 98 percentile in the past years which shows how rigorous it is for a student to get admission to this institute. Additionally, there is no information about the college giving admission to MBA (or PGP) courses without CAT.However, for those who wish to get into the institute without CAT, IIM Indore also offers a five-year Integrated Programme in Management for which candidates need to take IPMAT after Class 12, which is followed by an interview. IIM Indore conducts IPM Aptitude Test (IPMAT) to test the applicant’s aptitude, logical reasoning and proficiency in English and Mathematics for admission to IPM. Shortlisted candidates further need to appear for the PI round wherein they will be judged on the basis of their confide

placement_report.college_name: IIM Indore Placements 2025: Average Package, Highest Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: IIM Indore Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest package offered to PGP and IPM students during IIM Indore placements 2025 was INR 70 LPA . PGP average and median package recorded in 2025 was INR 29.57 LPA and INR 27 LPA , respectively. More than 225 recruiters visited the campus during IIM Indore PGP placements 2025 . IT / Analytics domain offered the highest package of INR 70 LPA . In terms of placement distribution, Consulting emerged as the top domain with 35.4% placement distribution .

30 recruiters visited the campus for PGPHRM batch in 2025 . The highest package offered during IIM Indore PGPHRM placements this year was INR 40 LPA . The average and median package recorded was INR 25 LPA and INR 24 LPA . Management Trainee HR role was the top role offered in 2025 to the PGPHRM batch.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered to PGP and IPM students at IIM Indore?
faqs.answer: IIM Indore has released the official placement report for the year 2024. As per the report, the IIM Indore average package offered to PGP batch 2024 stood at INR 25.68 LPA. The table below showcases PGP average package offered in the last three years: Particulars Statistics (2022) Statistics (2023) Statistics (2024) Average package INR 25.01 LPA INR 30.21 LPA INR 25.68 LPA

faqs.question: What are the stipends offered to PGP and IPM students during IIM Indore summer placements?
faqs.answer: IIM Indore has released the PGP and IPM summer placement report for 2023-25 batch. The highest and average stipend offered was INR 6.6 lakh, INR 2.25 LPA, respectively. The table below showcases stipends offered to PGP and IPM students during IIM Indore summer placements: Particulars Statistics (Batch 2023) Statistics (Batch 2024) Statistics (Batch 2025) Highest INR 4 lakh INR 6 lakh INR 6.6 lakh Average INR 2 lakh INR 2.74 lakh INR 2.25 lakh Median INR 2 lakh INR 2.7 lakh INR 2.12 lakh Top 100 average stipend INR 3.10 lakh INR 4.22 lakh INR 3.97 lakh Top 200 average stipend INR 2.75 lakh INR 3.86 lakh INR 3.49 lakh

faqs.question: Is IPM program offered by IIM Indore a good choice in terms of career and placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, IIM Indore has recorded 100% placements for its PGP and IPM batches passing out in 2024. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered to PGP and IPM students during IIM Indore placements 2024 stood at INR 100 LPA and INR 25.68 LPA, respectively. Further, over 150 recruiters visited the campus and placed 594 students of the batch 2024. description: IIM Indore cutoff 2024 is available on this page for MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIM Indore CAT cutoff 2024 across different courses and categories. Further updates related to CAT 2025 are provided below:

IIM Indore CAT Cutoff 2024 will be released for Post Graduate Program in Management (PGP) and, Post Graduate Programme in Human Resource Management (PGP-HRM), based on CAT scores. IIM Indore releases two types of Cutoffs- a) Qualifying CAT Cutoff and b) Final CAT Cutoff. To be able to appear for the CAT Final Exam (WAT and PI), the candidate must attain a minimum Qualifying Cutoff. IIM Indore final CAT cutoff is always higher than the qualifying cutoff. According to the IIM Indore Cutoff 2024, t

IIM Indore admission 2025 has been released based on the CAT Cutoff 2024 list. Candidates qualifying both the overall CAT cutoff percentile and the sectional cutoffs will be eligible for MBA admission. IIM Indore CAT cutoff 2024 has been released recently for the Post Graduate Programme in Human Resource Management (PGP-HRM) for the various All India quotas. The CAT cutoff for the General AI category candidates stood at 97, indicating a similar cutoff to that of 2023. Candidates can check the ta

IIM Indore MBA cutoff 2024, along with previous years' cutoff lists, is tabulated below. Aspirants preparing for the next academic session can refer to the table below to view or download the year-wise cutoff lists to understand the cutoff trends.

The admission to IIMs is based on the final cutoffs including both overall and sectional cutoffs through which the candidates are called for the GD/PI round. The cutoffs were released for various MBA specialisations and different All-India categories. hostel.description:
Indian Institute of Management, Indore residential facilities include hostels for all the students.
Single-seated/ twin-sharing accommodation facilities are available for all the students in the campus premises with separate blocks/ floors for men and women. Each of the block has a square in the center where basketball/ badminton courts with artificial turf are maintained, with some blocks also having lawns in the square. Each hostel block has a common room where facilities such as wall-mounted televisions with DTH connection, table-tennis tables, dart game and carom and chess games are available and each block is also equipped with water coolers and water purifiers. The housekeeping staff is available throughout the week to take care of cleaning of rooms, corridors and rest rooms on a daily basis.

data: Library, Hostels, Board Rooms, Meeting Room, Studio Room, Recreational Room, Cafeteria, etc.

library.description: The IIM Indore Learning Centre (LC) with its modern collection of knowledge resources and innovative information services; fills an essential role for students, faculty, and the surrounding community in their intellectual pursuits. The resources available in LC include 2,50,000 e-books, 10000+ e-journals, 36,000 print books & bound journals, 59 databases, 150 print journals & magazines. It is a hybrid library with the state-of-the-art technological applications, holding knowledge resources predominantly related to management and allied subjects. The entire LC collection including the CD-ROM databases and the online databases are made available through Institute’s network. The LC offers a range of information services to support the learning process set to the highest professional standards. IIMI Library is an active member of IIM Consortia & INDEST Consortia.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Meditation, Aerobics and Yoga Room, Steam Bath Area, Cardio Zone Area, Billiards, Volleyball Courts, Event Court, Table Tennis Court, Sauna Bath Area

reviews.review_heading: I like my college and our professors.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel facility is very good, and the food quality is good. Our college authority provided a high-speed internship to students. Our classroom is very good and big. But our college sports facilities are not very good. In our college, a well-stocked library is provided by the authority.

reviews.review_heading: Post graduate program in management at IIM Indore.
reviews.review_text: The exact fee range would basically above 2.5 lakhs and between 3 lakhs and 5.6 lakhs for the entire course duration which included hostels, placement, and other fees too. Even though the seats were too limited, the curious of students joining the college was unstoppable. College administration was so lethargic in responding.

reviews.review_heading: IIM Indore has a big name, but inside, it's not good, and there is no support.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are not clean, and the fans do not work sometimes. Wi-Fi is very slow. Classrooms are okay, but AC is not always available. The library is big, but there are old books. The mess food is bad, but the oil is old and not fresh. The canteen is costly. The sports ground is broken. Medical help comes late, and I'm not happy with the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel stay was compulsory on the campus. The rooms were spaced enough with bed, table, and chair. Each student got a room in PG course while some PGP-HR students got a shared room. One of the drawbacks was that there was a set of washrooms on floors instead of attached washrooms in the room.

reviews.review_heading: IIM Indore College review.
reviews.review_text: The college had the best infrastructure compared to the other colleges in the city. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus. Our classrooms were very clean. The library had good books. We had clean washrooms. The hostel did not provide good things. The food was the worst. Sports were good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is overall good .
reviews.review_text: The IIM Indore campus spans over 200 acres. The institute has high-speed internet, well-equipped laboratories, air-conditioned classrooms, a conference hall, and a seminar hall. The main building looks like a building from heaven. Hostels are in good condition, and the mess and canteen food available is the best. The medical facilities are also provided by the college administration.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIM Indore - Indian Institute of Management.
reviews.review_text: Facilities present in my course are so good. The infrastructure is not good. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and labs are present for students. The library is not available in the college. The canteen food is good. Medical facilities are present in my courses. Sports and games facilities are also present.

reviews.review_heading: Something about my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best perks of IIM Indore. Spanning almost 200 acres, there is a sports complex with various activities, including a swimming pool, squash court, sauna, gym, etc., two large auditoriums, many food courts, and a lot of lush greenery. The campus is very clean and peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely amazing institute because of its excellent placements.
reviews.review_text: The best infrastructure with all facilities is available. Buildings and departments have unique designs. Multiple grounds and courts are available for playing, with the best and most experienced coaches. The canteen offers average-quality food, and medical facilities with beds are provided. Classrooms with ACs, and there are huge departmental libraries.

reviews.review_heading: Shiksha college review online.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in my college were so super. Infrastructure of the college was very good. Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, and all things were available for students. The quality and facility in my hostel canteen were so good. Food was very tasty and medical facilities were available. Sports and games were also present for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Very resourceful and well satisfying facilities.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities and infrastructure available for our department are very satisfying. Classrooms and labs are modified and well-maintained. A well-stocked library is available, with a vast collection of books. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent management and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities and infrastructure available for our department are very good. The classrooms and labs are well-maintained and very modified. A well-stocked library with a vast collection of books is present. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Great facilities and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our college are very satisfying. Our classrooms and labs are very modified and well-maintained. Wi-Fi is available for everyone. Many varieties of food items are present in the canteen. The quality of the food is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with almost everything.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities at the Indian Institute of Management (IIM) in Indore are known for being comfortable and well-maintained. Here are some key aspects of the hostel's facilities: The rooms are air-conditioned and well-furnished, with facilities such as a B.Ed. wardrobe and study table. The hostels have their own dining facilities, serving nutritious and tasty meals to students. The hostels are equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi and laundry facilities for the convenience of students. The hostels ...

reviews.review_heading: It ain't as good as they all say.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi: Good, it has a backup line as well. Wi-Fi and storage capacity: very limited and troublesome. Throughout the course, you can only have 20GB of drive space, which is too low. Classrooms: Good. But now the program intake has increased, and they have not built new classrooms, which is why many classrooms are congested. Library: The online database is great. Sitting capacity, interiors, books, etc., are okayish and can be improved a lot when compared to IIM-A or Amity Noida, etc. Sports: Terr...

data.description: IIM Indore has a good and knowledgeable faculty. As per the Shiksha verified students review, it has been observed that the faculty members are highly reputed and qualified from reputed big institutes of India. They are very experienced in the field of management.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about IIM Indore - Indian Institute of Management

likes.text: Companies like EXL service, HDFC, HSBC, ICICI, JPMC, KPMG, L'Oreal and Mother Dairy also hired from the lot of IPM students.
Due to the large size of the batch, it takes considerable time, But everyone gets placed, thanks to the efforts of the placement cell of our college.

college_info.college_name: IIM Indore Scholarship Details

paragraphs: IIM Indore provides Need-Based Financial Assistance (NBFA) to PGP/ IPM students with annual family income below INR 9 lakh who are eligible to apply for financial aid. The objective of the Need-Based Financial Assistance (NBFA) at IIM Indore is to ensure that no participant is deprived of education at the institute for financial reasons. The NBFA Committee undertakes a two-step process for deciding the number of awardees and quantum of aid.

The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and D.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions courses range between INR 12,000 to 4,23,284.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good, we have good facilities and good staff also, and we have a big campus.

review_content.Placements: Our college is giving a placement for those students who are good at studying and have practical knowledge. Many students have done their Diploma and got a good job, like 8 to 10 LPA. Mostly, our college is linked with Tata, Mahindra, and many MNC companies that provide us with internships and jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has labs for practicals like the mechanical lab, computer lab, and medical lab. Our college provides us with free Wi-Fi access, which is good for us. The college has a library, which is the most useful thing. Our hostel has nice rooms, and the mess food is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027

overview_faqs.answer: Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions is a well-known institution for B.Tech, After 1th Diploma, D.Pharma, B.Pharma, M.Pharma, MBA/PGDM courses. overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: In our college, there is good placement for every student. The highest package is 5 LPA, and the average package is 2 LPA. Companies that visited include TCS and others. There are good internships available for every student on campus, and many companies visit. The top role in the company is management.
content.Infrastructure: In our hostel, fresh food is provided for every student. Healthy food is available. In the hostel, free Wi-Fi access is for all students. There are also student labs available. Good medical facilities are available in the hostel, and the canteen is very big with every type of sport available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College has very good infrastructure and better placements.

content.Placements: In our college, almost all students have gotten placements in better companies. The highest package is 9 lakh per year, and the lowest package is 5 lakh per year. The companies that come to the college include TCS and Infosys, etc. All students get internships in companies. The course work has developed.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the infrastructure is very good, and the roads are very nice. There are different courses and separate labs available in our college, and three Wi-Fi access points are available for every student. The classrooms are e-classrooms and smart classrooms. In our hostels, food is very good, and healthy foods are provided to students, along with mineral water and various different varieties of food and snacks available for students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good, we have good facilities and good staff also, and we have a big campus.

content.Placements: Our college is giving a placement for those students who are good at studying and have practical knowledge. Many students have done their Diploma and got a good job, like 8 to 10 LPA. Mostly, our college is linked with Tata, Mahindra, and many MNC companies that provide us with internships and jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has labs for practicals like the mechanical lab, computer lab, and medical lab. Our college provides us with free Wi-Fi access, which is good for us. The college has a library, which is the most useful thing. Our hostel has nice rooms, and the mess food is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has very good infrastructure and a better placement rate.

content.Placements: In our college, almost all students are placed in good companies. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Companies include Tata Motors and others. All students in this course get internships. My course role is mechanics.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in our college is very good. Roads are well-maintained. Free Wi-Fi access is available. Separate labs are provided for each course. Hostel food is of good quality and healthy, and filtered water is available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: There is very good infrastructure and absolutely very good placements in our college since 2015.

content.Placements: In our college, all students are placed in good companies. In our college, the highest package is 9 LPA and the lowest package is 5 LPA. In our college, all students get placement. My course is used in medicine making and medicine supplying. Companies like Sun Pharma and others visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, good infrastructure and good roads and grounds are available. Free Wi-Fi access is available. Separate classrooms are available, and in our hostel good quality food is provided. Filtered water is given, and all sports grounds and games are available.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 431844 and 514292 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 431844, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 45971
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 431844.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 4.05 and 24.95, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Electrical, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 24.95. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cuto

Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Electrical turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 24.95. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 43.96 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

Getting an idea of different years’ cutoff trends helps students prepare better for upcoming examinations. To assist with the same, the table below provides MHT CET cutoff for 2025, 2024, and 2023. Students can download the year-wise PDF for future reference.

The Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 30.11. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 36.91 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions was 30.11. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 48.2 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 8.69.

Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (MAH CET) is a state level management entrance test for admission to MBA/MMS courses. The MAH MBA CET 2025 cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students can view other important dates for MAH MBA CET 2026 in the table below:

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 61.28 to 46.38 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 46.38. Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories and quotas, and rounds year-wise cutoff of 2025, 2024, and 2023.

Students who want to gain a seat at Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions for the MCA course should know the cutoff trends over the years to better understand what percentiles are required for admissions. To help with the same, the table below contains the consolidated year-wise PDFs for 2025, 2024, and 2023.
