hostel_campus.college_name: Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our hostel, fresh food is provided for every student. Healthy food is available. In the hostel, free Wi-Fi access is for all students. There are also student labs available. Good medical facilities are available in the hostel, and the canteen is very big with every type of sport available.

reviews.review_heading: College has very good infrastructure and better placements.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is very good, and the roads are very nice. There are different courses and separate labs available in our college, and three Wi-Fi access points are available for every student. The classrooms are e-classrooms and smart classrooms. In our hostels, food is very good, and healthy foods are provided to students, along with mineral water and various different varieties of food and snacks available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good, we have good facilities and good staff also, and we have a big campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college has labs for practicals like the mechanical lab, computer lab, and medical lab. Our college provides us with free Wi-Fi access, which is good for us. The college has a library, which is the most useful thing. Our hostel has nice rooms, and the mess food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and a better placement rate.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is very good. Roads are well-maintained. Free Wi-Fi access is available. Separate labs are provided for each course. Hostel food is of good quality and healthy, and filtered water is available.

reviews.review_heading: There is very good infrastructure and absolutely very good placements in our college since 2015.
reviews.review_text: In our college, good infrastructure and good roads and grounds are available. Free Wi-Fi access is available. Separate classrooms are available, and in our hostel good quality food is provided. Filtered water is given, and all sports grounds and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: There is a very good college with infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, and free Wi-Fi is available. Each department has a separate library. Hostel food is of good quality. Filtered water is available. The hostel has a gym and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the entire campus is covered with Wi-Fi. All departments have separate classrooms. All departments have their own labs for their respective work or practicals. In our college, there is a massive library where all types of books are available.

reviews.review_heading: We have a beautiful campus and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The department provides digital classrooms, digital labs, libraries, and other facilities. The hostel offers quality food and many amenities like a gym, study hall, sick room, and other available facilities. Sports are always the first priority for boys and top of the sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our campus, the infrastructure is very good, with a big ground and different courses having separate classrooms and labs. All types of books are available in the library. In our hostel, free Wi-Fi access is provided. The hostel serves fresh and healthy food to students, and there is a big canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure, and it gives the placement opportunity.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is very beautifully decorated and developed. The labs are clean, and students get unlimited Wi-Fi. The college library provides books for all semesters and all courses. In the hostel, there are separate rooms for all students. Each student gets a table and chair for study.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, there were good placements in 2015 and a normal infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good, and the campus is clean. There are separate labs for all courses, and smart classrooms are available. There is a big library and free Wi-Fi access. In our hostel, they give fresh food, filtered water, and healthy food for students.

reviews.review_heading: Parikrama faculty of engineering, A-NAAC accreditation, because of the infrastructure and placement.
reviews.review_text: Parikrama College is the best college in terms of infrastructure. Parikrama is spread over 110 acres. There are separate classrooms for every department with projectors. The seating arrangement is also good. They provide a large library with various types of books. You can take books from the library and go to the reading hall for your studies. This place is very quiet. Wi-Fi is also provided in the library, classrooms and also in the hostel. Now, about the hostel, it has 4 floors. Mess food is ...

reviews.review_heading: There are very good faculty in our college, and average students are placed in good companies.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is a big ground and very good infrastructure. There are separate labs for separate courses, and a big canteen in our college, and Wi-Fi access is available for students in our hostel. The food quality is very good. And filtered water is included in hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and has good facilities and a good teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very big campus of around 200 acres. This provides us with very good roads. We also have access to Wi-Fi, and we also have big labs and classrooms, and the college also provides very good library facilities. Our hostel provides decent accommodation and good quality of food, and our hostel also filters water, has a big sports ground and other sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: The college could perform better in placements and labs.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good, especially for Computer Engineering. The college has three Wi-Fi servers and three labs. Many classrooms for other departments as well. Each classroom has a projector installed for students. The hostel is also good, with good food quality. The hostel has its own medical ward and sports equipment. It includes cricket kits, badminton, and football.

college_info.college_name: VNS Group of Institutions: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the VNS Group of Institutions:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time and Part Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Pharma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Pharma. The VNS Group of Institutions course fee ranges between INR 36,000 to 1,80,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the VNS Group of Institutions is around INR 40000 - INR 220000.
faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the VNS Group of Institutions?

reviews_list.review_title: College itself is average and infrastructure is very good.

review_content.Placements: Most students from this course got placed in well-known companies. The highest package offered is around 45 LPA and the lowest can be as low as 4 LPA. There are a lot of great recruiters in this field like TCS, Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Samsung, Apple, Microsoft, and many more. When it comes to internships it is all about skill set, the better you are at your work the better the chances for you to get an internship or job.
review_content.Infrastructure: I must say, infrastructure is very good. There are lots of classrooms, libraries, canteens, difference types of labs, Wi-Fi in every corners of the campus and many more. When it comes to hostel, I would say it's okay, it's not that good but it's not bad either. The food quality is great and I love the taste.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of VNS Group of Technology Bhopal.

review_content.Placements: There is a 75% chance of getting placements. The lowest package is 4 LPA and the highest is 8-10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lab and the classrooms are well-furnished and equipped with AC. The infrastructure is good with beautiful gardens. There are guards on the campus to provide security.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful. There is no ragging or harassment. Our seniors are also very helpful and provide guidance.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good. There is a lot to study and learn.

review_content.Placements: The college is not so good for placements. However, many companies visit the college and provide opportunities to students. I have seen students getting placement in L&T company in front of me. The highest salary package offered is 6.5 LPA. I have seen him getting placed as a supervisor and engineer in L&T.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The list of courses is very good. Students will get to learn good courses in this college. I have not stayed in the hostel but my friend stays in the hostel. The infrastructure of the college is in a very good location and it is also convenient for the students to come and go. There are many other co-curricular activities in the college.

review_summary.college_name: VNS Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My dream college is for education and not for placements.

content.Placements: I am from batch 2021-2025 Bachelor of Pharmacy. At the time, I am writing this review, only 1 company has come that is Symbiosis. But last year 2024 batch got very good placements. Students got placed in big companies like Nestled and other companies. Placements are average here.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very good. Labs are excellent according to my thinking. In B. Pharmacy, labs play an important role than theory class. In VNS all types of labs like pharmaceuticals lab, pharmacology lab, and pharmacognosy lab are available with advanced tools like HPLC, FTIR, dissolution testing apparatus, US/VIS spectroscopy particle size analyser, muffle furnace, etc. For pharmacology, animal house is available. For PG students regular class is available with advanced experiential labs. A hostel facility is not available. The bus facility is available that services all over Bhopal.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: All faculty members in our college are awesome.

content.Placements: About 62-70% of students are able to get placed in our college. The highest package in our college is 2 LPA. The lowest salary is Rs. 20,000 per month. There are so many courses in our college like B Pharma, D Pharma, B.Tech, etc. About 8 CGPA students got internships. The top roles offered in the college are secretary and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are best. It has all the chemical and practical related books and materials. The library is very useful for all students as they provide all the books that are important for our practical and subjects which we studied in our course. There is no hostel in our college. The canteen is the best in our college. We get good and affordable food. There are many sports and games in our college. There are international-level and college-level games also like football and basketball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College itself is average and infrastructure is very good.

content.Placements: Most students from this course got placed in well-known companies. The highest package offered is around 45 LPA and the lowest can be as low as 4 LPA. There are a lot of great recruiters in this field like TCS, Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Samsung, Apple, Microsoft, and many more. When it comes to internships it is all about skill set, the better you are at your work the better the chances for you to get an internship or job.

description: VNS Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the VNS Group of Institutions JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

VNS Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 333861 and 1224500 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 333861, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 333861.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the VNS Group of Institutions B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning, B.E. in Mining Engineering and B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 333861, 1209724, and 1224500, respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: VNS Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My dream college is for education and not for placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good. Labs are excellent according to my thinking. In B. Pharmacy, labs play an important role than theory class. In VNS all types of labs like pharmaceuticals lab, pharmacology lab, and pharmacognosy lab are available with advanced tools like HPLC, FTIR, dissolution testing apparatus, US/VIS spectroscopy particle size analyser, muffle furnace, etc. For pharmacology, animal house is available. For PG students regular class is available with advanced experiential labs. A hoste...

reviews.review_heading: All faculty members in our college are awesome.
reviews.review_text: Labs are best. It has all the chemical and practical related books and materials. The library is very useful for all students as they provide all the books that are important for our practical and subjects which we studied in our course. There is no hostel in our college. The canteen is the best in our college. We get good and affordable food. There are many sports and games in our college. There are international-level and college-level games also like football and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: College itself is average and infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: I must say, infrastructure is very good. There are lots of classrooms, libraries, canteens, difference types of labs, Wi-Fi in every corners of the campus and many more. When it comes to hostel, I would say it's okay, it's not that good but it's not bad either. The food quality is great and I love the taste.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VNS Group of Technology Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The lab and the classrooms are well-furnished and equipped with AC. The infrastructure is good with beautiful gardens. There are guards on the campus to provide security.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. There is a lot to study and learn.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The list of courses is very good. Students will get to learn good courses in this college. I have not stayed in the hostel but my friend stays in the hostel. The infrastructure of the college is in a very good location and it is also convenient for the students to come and go. There are many other co-curricular activities in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Mining Diploma from VNS College.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities and infrastructure are very good, and hostel rooms are clean. Every room has a study table and some other stuff. Every room has 2 students sharing. Mess food quality is quite decent. The hostel has Wi-Fi, and the library also has Wi-Fi. Hostel fees are 65,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VNS Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text:
AC labs, AC-provided rooms, well-furnished classes, good infrastructure, highly qualified teachers, well-developed buildings, etc. are there.
Natural and beautiful gardening area. Good guards are there. Maintained rules and regulations for students. Labs have full AC coverage and a good view to see our future brightly.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely amazing because they provide quality education and train students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides lots of facilities in the Department of Pharmacy. Facilities such as access to the computer lab and daily lab facilities for subjects like Pharmacology and Pharmaceutics are provided. Our college has a license for handling animals. There is a library and Wi-Fi infrastructure. The infrastructure is also good. However, our college does not provide hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college. If you really wants to save your future try other colleges.
reviews.review_text: For a student who does not afford much can take admission in this college because they only want a degree. I don't know about the hostel because I do not live in hostel here.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good. I am satisfied with this college because of its good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is good. Our college provides free Wi-Fi. It has good labs, large classrooms, and a library. The quality of facilities in our hostel is good. The food served in the mess and canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: VNS Group of Institutions has value for money.
reviews.review_text: On campus, there is no hostel available. There is a huge library where approximately 50 to 60 students can sit and study at one time. All types of books are available in the library. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Our classrooms and labs are quite good. All types of equipment are available in labs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is one of the best colleges for pharmacy in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and classrooms is average. Laboratories are good for performing experiments and practicals. All the equipment is available in good condition. The auditorium and seminar halls are average. Various informative sessions are held in seminar halls. There are no hostels available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college in certain fields.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good on daily basis. Laboratories are well maintained with proper facilities. Equipment is also good in this college. Classrooms are well furnished. The canteen facilities are not good, and the food quality is average. Sports and games are held regularly.

reviews.review_heading: I had a good college experience in this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are pretty good in the CSE department. VNS has at least 150 computers. The hostel is quite far from college, but it is not a downside as they provide comfortable bus facilities from college to your place. The college is pretty equipped with essential necessities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely it is the worst college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the worst infrastructure I have ever seen. It has a poor library and a pathetic and unhygienic canteen facility. Labs are available just for namesake, and they don't have proper equipment and materials. Everything is outdated in labs.

faqs.answer: A:    Hygia Institute of Pharmaceutical Education & Research is a well-known institution for B.Pharma, Pharm.D, M.Pharma, D.Pharma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Hygia Institute of Pharmaceutical Education & Research has course specializations in Pharmacy Practice, Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfying because of faculty members and good placement in 2023.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered was 10 Lacs per annum, and the lowest was 3 Lacs. The average salary was 5-6 lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies are Mankind and Sun Pharma. The top roles offered by the companies in my course were managerial positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides all types of facilities for students, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a seminar hall, DLC labs, and many other types of extra facilities. The food quality is excellent, and a single student can get a meal for approximately 60 rupees. All sports games are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: All about the Pharmacy College.

review_content.Placements: As my senior told me, only 10 to 20% of students get placement in the college. The highest package was 5 lakh per annum, the lowest was 1.5 lakh per annum, and the average was about 2.5 lakh per annum. Companies like TATA, Apollo Medics, etc., participated in the placement drives. Most of the students got placements in industrial roles, while others pursued masters.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food quality was not that good when I started studying here, but it changed in my second year. My college has a sports area, but students generally don't play sports, nor does the college provide many sports except cricket. My college has all types of machines, equipment, and drugs used in the pharmacy field.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty members and teaching quality.

review_content.Placements: About 20% of students were placed. The highest package is of 4.5 L. p. a, the lowest package is of 2.5 L. p. a and average package is of 3.5 L. p. a. Top companies for recruitment are- cipla, abott, sun pharma. About 20% of students got internship in cipla, abott and many more local companies. Top roles offered are - drug inspector, hospital pharmacist, marketing executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the college for faculty members and for students also, labs are organised 4 days every week with proper procedure and requirements, classrooms are well maintained with proper lectures and seats are comfortable to do work, library is good with proper stocks of books and seats. The quality of food in mess is good and hygienic, medical facilities are also available in the college and there is a sports complex with proper facilities of games.

lists: Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

review_summary.college_name: Hygia Institute of Pharmaceutical Education & Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma. Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure here.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed each year in all courses. 12 LPA is average package and the lowest is 6 LPA. The average salary is 8 LPA. Recruiting companies are Cipla, etc. 60% of students got internships on their merit in many companies. Sales executive, manager, and supervisor roles are offered mostly.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities and infrastructure available in course like labs, library, Wi-Fi, and smart classroom with AC. Mess and other facilities like sports are the best in our college, and also focus on sports. In college, all the facilities are the best for students, and also include biometric attendance.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Hygia- Shapes the future in the field of pharmacy.

content.Placements: Around 87% of students got placed. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA-5 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Pathkind Labs, Winmedicare, and ECLAT Solutions. Around 92% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: One projector, one whiteboard, and one podium are available. Classrooms are well-equipped and space for sitting is available. Hostel is only available for girls. Good quality of food available in the mess and canteen, and proper basic requirements of medical is also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfying because of faculty members and good placement in 2023.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered was 10 Lacs per annum, and the lowest was 3 Lacs. The average salary was 5-6 lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies are Mankind and Sun Pharma. The top roles offered by the companies in my course were managerial positions.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides all types of facilities for students, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a seminar hall, DLC labs, and many other types of extra facilities. The food quality is excellent, and a single student can get a meal for approximately 60 rupees. All sports games are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: All about the Pharmacy College.

content.Placements: As my senior told me, only 10 to 20% of students get placement in the college. The highest package was 5 lakh per annum, the lowest was 1.5 lakh per annum, and the average was about 2.5 lakh per annum. Companies like TATA, Apollo Medics, etc., participated in the placement drives. Most of the students got placements in industrial roles, while others pursued masters.
content.Infrastructure: The food quality was not that good when I started studying here, but it changed in my second year. My college has a sports area, but students generally don't play sports, nor does the college provide many sports except cricket. My college has all types of machines, equipment, and drugs used in the pharmacy field.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty members and teaching quality.

content.Placements: About 20% of students were placed. The highest package is of 4.5 L. p. a, the lowest package is of 2.5 L. p. a and average package is of 3.5 L. p. a. Top companies for recruitment are- cipla, abott, sun pharma. About 20% of students got internship in cipla, abott and many more local companies. Top roles offered are - drug inspector, hospital pharmacist, marketing executive.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the college for faculty members and for students also, labs are organised 4 days every week with proper procedure and requirements, classrooms are well maintained with proper lectures and seats are comfortable to do work, library is good with proper stocks of books and seats. The quality of food in mess is good and hygienic, medical facilities are also available in the college and there is a sports complex with proper facilities of games.

highlights.summary: A leading institute in the city offers 25 courses of Degree. Maulana Azad University is a well-known institution for UG, PG and After 10th courses, These programs delivered by a highly experienced faculty. Maulana Azad University offers a range of UG, PG and After 10th courses, These courses are designed to provide students with the necessary skills and knowledge to chosen field. Candidate can pursue in multiple range of courses like B.A., M.A., B.Com, M.Com, B.Sc., BCA, B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, After 10th Diploma, MS, MPH, MBA/PGDM, M.Sc., M.Pharma, B.Pharma, D.Pharma with the stream of Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, Science, IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Teaching & Education, Medicine & Health Sciences. Courses offered by the Institute are in the fee range of INR 68,500-221,000 for a total of 187 candidates. Most importantly, these courses with 187 seats are imparted at affordable fees with range of INR 68,500-221,000, which increase accessibility and allow students the opportunity to gain knowledge and skills in their chosen field.

answer.text: There are plenty of jobs for fresh Computer Science Engineering graduates. Candidates from top notch engineering colleges get attractive job offers from IT MNCs. CSE course graduates can also get jobs in non-IT companies like universities, research, private and public industries, government departments, business organisations, commercial organisations and the manufacturing sector, etc.You also have plenty of options to work in different departments such as design, development, assembly, manufacture and maintenance, etc. Working as programmer, web developer, and E- commerce specialist with telecommunications companies, automotive companies, aerospace companies, etc. can be a lucrative career option as well. Moreover, numerous national and multi-national computer manufacturing companies, computer hardware system design and development companies, computer networking companies, software development companies, etc. require computer professionals in large numbers.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: What is the scope of healthcare management in India?
overview_faqs.answer: In India, Healthcare/Hospital Sector is in growing face because due to higher no. of population and area we need lot of hospital and best in practice and services. There are lot of institute which provides course in different fields related to Healthcare & Hospital sector. IIHMR Bangalore, for Maharashtra you can look for SGRR Group of Institutions Dehradun.Note: Info is taken from other sources and can be different.
